Judges12:1 Jayave kuimbae reta Efraín iñemuña pegua reta oyomboatɨ jare oasa reta ɨ̈aka Jordán ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ Zafón re katu
Judges12:2 Jefté jei chupe reta: —Che
Judges12:3 Jare aecha mbaetɨ ma peyu oremborɨ vaerä yave
Judges12:4 Jayave Jefté omboatɨ opaete kuimbae Galaad pegua
Judges12:5 Galaad pegua reta opɨ̈ro Efraín iñemuña reta güi ɨ̈aka Jordán tɨpɨmbaea jare amogüe Efraín pegua otekuarai vae oväe joko pe jare oiporu oasa vaerä yave
Judges12:6 oiporu jei vaerä “Shibolet”; jae jei yave “Sibolet” oipɨɨ jare oñaseokɨ̈ti ɨ̈aka Jordán tɨpɨmbaea pe
Judges12:7 Jefté oiko Israel iñemuña reta juvicharä ova año. Omano yave oñotɨ reta metei tëta Galaad pegua pe.
Judges12:8 Jefté jaɨkue rupi
Judges12:9 güɨnoi treinta taɨ jare treinta tayɨ
Judges12:10 jare omano yave oñotɨ reta Belén pe.
Judges12:11 Jaɨkue rupi
Judges12:12 jare omano yave oñotɨ reta Ajalón pe
Judges12:13 Jae jaɨkue rupi
Judges12:14 chau año rupi. Abdón güɨnoi cuarenta taɨ jare treinta jɨmɨmino
Judges12:15 Omano yave oñotɨ reta Piratón pe
Judges13:1 Israel iñemuña reta jekuae oyapo ye ikavimbae yandeYa jesa róvai
Judges13:2 Zora pe oiko metei kuimbae Manoa jee vae Dan iñemuña pegua; jembireko mbaetɨ imembɨ
Judges13:3 Ërei yandeYa iaraɨgua oyekuaa chupe
Judges13:4 Añave güive agüɨye jeu vino ani mbae oporombosavaɨpo vae
Judges13:5 jare jókuae nemembɨ renoita vae mbaetɨta reñapi
Judges13:6 Jare kuña ojo imiari ime pe
Judges13:7 Jae jei cheve: ‘Ndepuruata jare oata nemembɨ kuimbae; jáeramo añave güive agüɨyeta reu vino ani mbae oporombosavaɨpo vae ani tembíu peumbae vaerä pereko vae reta
Judges13:8 Jayave Manoa oyerure yandeYa pe jei: “CheYa
Judges13:9 Jare Tumpa oendu Manoa iyerure
Judges13:10 jae osɨi ojo omombeu ime pe
Judges13:11 Manoa opüa ojo jembireko ndive jókuae kuimbae oïa pe
Judges13:12 Jayave Manoa jei: —Jókuae remombeu vae oyembopo yave
Judges13:13 YandeYa iaraɨgua jei Manoa pe: —Nderembireko toyapo opaete jae chupe vae:
Judges13:14 Agüɨye tou uva güi mbae oyeapogüe
Judges13:15 Manoa mbaetɨ ave oikuaa jókuae kuimbae jae ko yandeYa iaraɨgua
Judges13:16 
Judges13:17 Jayave Manoa jei araɨgua pe: —¿Mbae pa nderee? Oremaendúa vaerä nderé romboete reve
Judges13:18 Ërei araɨgua jei chupe: —¿Maera pa reipota reikuaa cheree? Oporomopɨakañɨ yae vae ko.
Judges13:19 Manoa oipɨɨ kavara kuimbae raɨ jare mbota temitɨ jäɨgüe
Judges13:20 tata jendɨ opüa ɨvate yave
Judges13:21 YandeYa iaraɨgua mbaetɨ ye oyekuaa Manoa pe ani jembireko pe. Jayave Manoa oikuaa jae ko yandeYa iaraɨgua vae
Judges13:22 jare jei jembireko pe: —Ñamanota ko
Judges13:23 Ërei kuña jei: —YandeYa oipota yandeyuka yave
Judges13:24 Jare jókuae kuña imembɨ oa metei kuimbae raɨ
Judges13:25 Jare metei ara Sansón oï Dan iñemuña reta jeyupa pe Zora jare Estaol ipäu pe yave. YandeYa iEspíritu omboɨpɨ oparavɨkɨ jese.
Judges14:1 Metei ara Sansón ogüeyɨ ojo tëta Timnat pe jare oecha metei kuña
Judges14:2 jare oyerova ye jëta pe yave omombeu tu jare ichɨ pe. Jei chupe reta: —Timnat pe aecha metei kuña filisteo reta tayɨ
Judges14:3 Ërei tu jare ichɨ jei reta chupe: —¿Mbaetɨ pa kuña opaete nerëtara ipɨte pe
Judges14:4 Tu jare ichɨ mbaetɨ ave oikuaa kuae yandeYa güi ko ou jökorai vaerä
Judges14:5 Sansón ojo tu ndive jare ichɨ ndive Timnat kotɨ
Judges14:6 Jayave yandeYa iespíritu ou Sansón re
Judges14:7 Javoi ojo omomiari kuñatai oipota yae vae.
Judges14:8 Mbovɨ ara jaɨkue rupi
Judges14:9 Oipɨɨ jókuae metei ipe ei vae jare jou ojo oiko. Oupitɨ tu jare ichɨ yave omee vi chupe reta jou vaerä
Judges14:10 Sansón tu ojo kuñatai oïa pe; jare Sansón oyapo arete
Judges14:11 Ërei filisteo reta okɨɨye chugüi ramo güɨraja treinta ivɨa-ïrurä ñogüɨnoi vaerä jae ndive.
Judges14:12 Jare jókuae treinta vae pe
Judges14:13 Ërei mbaetɨ jae kavi pemombeu mbae ko oipota jei vae yave
Judges14:14 Jayave Sansón jei chupe reta: “Oporou vae güi oë tembíu; jare ipɨ̈rata yae vae güi oë jëe yae vae.” Mboapɨ ara rupi
Judges14:15 jayave irundɨa ara pe jei reta Sansón jembireko pe: —Eeka kërai neme omombeu vaerä ndeve mbae ra oipota jei jókuae jei oreve vae
Judges14:16 Jayave Sansón jembireko oyaeo reve ojo
Judges14:17 Ërei jae jekuaeñoi oyaeo opaete jókuae chiu ara arete oiko vae pe
Judges14:18 Chiúa ara pe
Judges14:19 YandeYa iEspíritu ou jese
Judges14:20 jare Sansón jembireko
Judges15:1 Oasa mbovɨ ara rupi
Judges15:2 jei chupe: —Ayemongeta ko mbaetɨ ma reipota
Judges15:3 Ërei Sansón jei chupe: —¡Añave mbaetɨ eteita filisteo reta chemboeko
Judges15:4 Jayave ojo oipɨɨ tresciento aguara
Judges15:5 jaɨkue rupi omoendɨ tata
Judges15:6 Filisteo reta omboɨpɨ oparandu kia ra jókuae oyapo vae
Judges15:7 Jayave Sansón jei: —Kuae peyapo vae jeko pegua
Judges15:8 Jare oporepeña jese reta iyarasɨ yae reve opa regua ikägüe oakɨo kɨo oyuka. Jare ojo oiko ɨvɨkua oï ɨ̈vavira Etam pe vae pe.
Judges15:9 Jayave filisteo reta yogüeru oyembojeyupa Judá pe
Judges15:10 jare kuimbae reta Judá pegua oparandu chupe reta: —¿Maera pa ko peyu peporepeña oreré? Jare jae reta jei: —Royu ko roipɨɨ Sansón royapo vaerä chupe jae oyapo oreve rami.
Judges15:11 Kuae oendu yave
Judges15:12 Jayave jae reta jei chupe: —Ore reta royu ko ropɨɨ romee filisteo reta ipo pe. Sansón jei: —Pere añetete cheve Tumpa jee re
Judges15:13 Jare jae reta jei chupe: —Mbaetɨ
Judges15:14 Yogüeru oväe reta Lehi pe yave
Judges15:15 javoi oipɨɨ mburika jañɨkagüe ndei ave otini ete vae
Judges15:16 Jaɨkue rupi jei: “Metei mburika jañɨkagüe pe ayapo metei jare mókoi atɨ; mburika jañɨkagüe pe ayuka mil kuimbae reta.”
Judges15:17 Opa imiari yave omombo ipo güi mburika jañɨkagüe
Judges15:18 Jare Sansón oyaporai yae ma ɨuve ramo
Judges15:19 Jayave Tumpa oipea ɨvɨkua Lehi pe oï vae; jare oë ɨ joko güi
Judges15:20 Sansón oiko Israel iñemuña reta juvicharä veinte año rupi
Judges16:1 Metei ara Sansón ojo tëta Gaza pe
Judges16:2 Gaza pegua reta oikuaa Sansón oime ko oï jókuae tëta pe yave
Judges16:3 Ërei Sansón jaeño oke pɨare mbɨte regua. Pɨare mbɨte opüa jare ojo tëta guasu jöke oekɨ jöke-ɨta reve jare oñemotäta pɨpe vae
Judges16:4 Kuae jaɨkue rupi Sansón iporopota metei kuña Dalila jee vae re
Judges16:5 Jare filisteo reta juvicha reta yogüeru Dalila pɨri
Judges16:6 Jayave jae jei Sansón pe: —Romoñera remombeu vaerä cheve kërai güi ko nepɨ̈rata yae vae
Judges16:7 Jare Sansón jei: —Cheäpɨti yave chiu yoɨvɨ güɨrapa iïcha ipɨau pe
Judges16:8 Jare filisteo reta juvicha reta güeru Dalila pe güɨrapa iïcha ipɨau vae jare pɨpe Dalila oñapɨti Sansón.
Judges16:9 Jókuae kuña omoñemi ma oñono tenonde voi kuimbae reta jo iárambo
Judges16:10 Dalila jei chupe: —¡Chembotavɨ! ¡Ndeapu yepe cheve! Ërei añave romoñera remombeu vaerä cheve
Judges16:11 Sansón jei chupe: —Cheäpɨti täta tɨmasa ipɨau jare ndei etei oyeporu vae pe yave
Judges16:12 Jayave Dalila oipɨɨ metei tɨmasa ipɨau vae
Judges16:13 Dalila jei Sansón pe: —¡Jekuae chembotavɨ ye! ¡Ndeapu ye cheve! ¡Emombeu cheve! ¿Kërai pa chepuere roäpɨti? Jare Sansón jei chupe: —Chea eñope chiu tɨmasa ombaapo vae jembiapo iïcha ndive
Judges16:14 jare opa oyapo güire oyatɨka etaka ɨvɨ re jare jei: —¡Sansón
Judges16:15 Jayave jae jei chupe: —¡Ndeapu! ¿Maera pa roaɨu rere cheve? Kuae re mboapɨ ma chembotavɨ
Judges16:16 Echa oparandu avei yae chupe opaete ara rupi ramo Sansón ombopɨakaviä yae jare oipotaecha omano;
Judges16:17 jáeramo omombeu chupe: —Mbaetɨi añeapi
Judges16:18 Dalila oikuaa ma ketɨ güi ko Sansón güɨnoi ipɨ̈rata yae vae yave
Judges16:19 Jare Dalila omonge jäpapau pe Sansón
Judges16:20 Jare jei chupe: —¡Sansón
Judges16:21 Jayave filisteo reta oipɨɨ jare opa güɨnoe chugüi jesäɨ jare güɨraja reta Gaza pe; joko pe oñapɨti reta karena jiero iyu vae pegua pe jare oiko tembipɨɨ rɨru pe ombaeyoso vaerä.
Judges16:22 Ërei ngatu ia omboɨpɨ ye okuakuaa jókuae oñapi reta güire.
Judges16:23 Jayave filisteo reta juvicha reta oyomboatɨ omee vaerä mɨmba oyeyukagüe itumpa Dagón pe
Judges16:24 Opaete vae reta oecha yave otairari vi omboete reta reve itumpa
Judges16:25 Jare oyandu reta ipɨa pe oyerovia yae ma yave
Judges16:26 Jayave Sansón jei kunumi oipoko vae pe: —Chereraja
Judges16:27 Opaete filisteo reta jare juvicha reta ñogüɨnoi jókuae tupao pe
Judges16:28 Jayave Sansón oyerure yandeYa pe
Judges16:29 Sansón opovɨvɨ jókuae mókoi okɨta opaete o oguapɨ jese vae re
Judges16:30 Jayave Sansón jei: “¡Filisteo reta tomano che ndive!” Jayave omoaña opaete ipɨ̈rata ndive jare tupao osururu filisteo reta juvicha reta re jare opaete joko pe ñogüɨnoi vae reta re. Sansón omano yave jeta yae oporoyuka tenonde yave oporoyuka vae güi.
Judges16:31 Jaɨkue rupi Sansón jëtara reta yogüeru güɨraja jëogüegüe
Judges17:1 Ɨvɨtɨ ɨvɨ Efraín pegua pe oiko metei kuimbae Micaía jee vae
Judges17:2 jae oyemombeu ichɨ pe
Judges17:3 
Judges17:4 Micaía omee ye güire korepoti ichɨ pe
Judges17:5 Micaía güɨnoi tumpa-raanga reta jenda
Judges17:6 Echa jókuae ara rupi mbaetɨ vɨteri mburuvicha guasu Israel pe
Judges17:7 Oiko metei kunumi ketɨgua tëta Belén
Judges17:8 Jókuae kunumi oë Belén güi oeka kia pe oiko vaerä
Judges17:9 Jare Micaía oparandu chupe: —¿Ketɨ güi pa reyu? Kunumi jei: —Belén güi
Judges17:10 Micaía jei chupe: —Epɨta jayave chépɨri kuae pe
Judges17:11 Jókuae Levita ikɨ̈reɨ opɨta oiko vaerä Micaía pɨri
Judges17:12 Jare Micaía oñono tee isacerdoterä jókuae levita
Judges17:13 Jayave Micaía oyemongeta Tumpa iporerekua oimeta güɨnoi
Judges18:1 Jókuae ara rupi mbaetɨ vɨteri mburuvicha guasu Israel pe. Dan iñemuña reta mbaetɨ vɨteri vi güɨnoi ɨvɨ imbae ae
Judges18:2 Jáeramo Dan iñemuña reta güi omondo reta pandepo kuimbae jëia yae vae Zora jare Estaol güi
Judges18:3 Micaía jo güi köi ma yogüɨraja yave oikuaa reta jókuae kunumi levita iñee
Judges18:4 Jare jókuae kunumi levita omombeu opaete Micaía oyapo chupe vae
Judges18:5 Jayave jae reta jei chupe: —Eparandu Tumpa pe
Judges18:6 Jare sacerdote levita jei chupe reta: —Pekua pepɨakatu reve; yandeYa ko ojo perenonde peangareko vaerä peoa rupi.
Judges18:7 Jayave jókuae pandepo kuimbae vae reta opa oë yogüɨraja oväe tëta Lais pe. Jare oecha reta jókuae tëta pegua reta yogüɨreko pɨagüive Sidón pegua reta rami
Judges18:8 Jayave jókuae pandepo kuimbae yogüɨraja omae vae yogüeru ye Zora jare Estaol pe
Judges18:9 —Rojo roguata jókuae ɨvɨ rupi
Judges18:10 Echa peo peväe joko pe yave peechata joko pegua reta yogüɨreko pɨagüive jare ɨvɨ tuicha vae
Judges18:11 Jayave seisciento kuimbae Dan iñemuña pegua ñogüɨnoe Zora jare Estaol güi jembiporu ñeraro pegua reve reve
Judges18:12 jare yogüɨraja oväe Judá pe
Judges18:13 Joko güi yogüɨraja Efraín pegua ɨvɨtɨ pe
Judges18:14 Jayave jókuae pandepo yogüɨraja oikuaa ɨvɨ Lais vae reta jei jëtara reta pe: —¿Peikuaa pa kuae pe oime mbae vae? Kuae pe oime temimonde iyɨvambae jare tumpa reta mbae iä oñeopa vae jare korepoti oyemondɨkuigüe pegua. ¿Peyemongeta kavi mbae peyapo vaerä?
Judges18:15 Jayave jókuae pandepo vae reta yogüɨraja kunumi levita pɨri Micaía jo pe
Judges18:16 Jare jókuae seisciento kuimbae Dan iñemuña pegua reta okätɨro öke pe jembiporu ñeraro pegua reve reve.
Judges18:17 Jare jókuae pandepo vae reta oike o pe jare oipɨɨ reta mbae iä oñeopa vae jare korepoti oyemondɨkuigüe pegua
Judges18:18 Sacerdote oecha yave jókuae pandepo vae reta oike Micaía jo pe jare güɨnoe mbae iä
Judges18:19 Jae reta jei chupe: —¡Nekïrii
Judges18:20 Kuae ikavi sacerdote pe
Judges18:21 Jayave jae reta ogüeyɨ tape pe jare omboɨpɨ oguata
Judges18:22 Mombɨrɨ ma yogüɨraja Micaía jo güi yave
Judges18:23 Dan iñemuña reta oendu yave osapúkai chupe oaɨkuemoña vae reta
Judges18:24 Jare Micaía jei chupe reta: —Pe reta peru peraja chegüi chetumpa reta
Judges18:25 Ërei Dan iñemuña reta jei chupe: —Agüɨye neñeeäta oreve
Judges18:26 Micaía oecha jae reta jeta yae yave
Judges18:27 opaete Micaía oyapogüe ndive
Judges18:28 Mbaetɨ kia oepɨ reta vaerä
Judges18:29 Jare ombojee Dan
Judges18:30 Joko pe Dan iñemuña reta oñono tumpa-raanga reta oñemopöra oyeapo vae omboete reta vaerä
Judges18:31 Joko pe güɨreko reta tumpa-raanga reta Micaía oyapogüe
Judges19:1 Jókuae ara rupi
Judges19:2 Ërei jókuae kuña jeko kaviä chupe
Judges19:3 jókuae levita ojo oeka omomiari vaerä mboroaɨu ndive güeru ye vaerä jupíe. Güɨraja vi jupíe metei jembiokuai
Judges19:4 Kuña tu oyerovia reve omboresive
Judges19:5 jare irundɨa ara pe ndeimbove yave opüa reta oyupavo yogüeru vaerä. Ërei jaema yogüeruta yave
Judges19:6 Jare mókoi reve oguapɨ okaru jare jou reta vino
Judges19:7 Yepe tëi levita opüa ojo vaerä
Judges19:8 Pandepoa ara pe
Judges19:9 Javoi levita opüa ma ojo vaerä jembireko jare jembiokuai ndive yave
Judges19:10 Ërei levita mbaetɨ ma oipota opɨta ye jókuae pɨ̈tu
Judges19:11 tembiokuai jei levita pe: —¿Mbae pa rere yapɨta vaerä kuae pɨ̈tu kuae jebuseo reta jëta pe?
Judges19:12 Ërei levita jei chupe: —Ngaraa yaja tëta Israel iñemuñambae pɨri. Yaasaño chugüi Gabaa kotɨ
Judges19:13 yaja yapɨta Gabaa pe ani Ramá pe.
Judges19:14 Oasa reta
Judges19:15 Jayave opia reta tape güi oike tëta Gabaa pe oputuu vaerä jókuae pɨ̈tu
Judges19:16 Jare ko metei ndechi ou oiko kaaruasɨ yave iparavɨkɨa güi
Judges19:17 Jókuae ndechi oecha yave oguata oiko vae tëta guasu joka pe
Judges19:18 Jare levita jei chupe: —Belén Judá pegua güi ko royu roasa koropi rojo vaerä mombɨrɨ Efraín pegua ɨvɨtɨ kotɨ che aikoa pe. Aja Belén Judá pegua pe
Judges19:19 Oime rogüɨnoi kapii jare atiɨgüe chemburika reta peguarä
Judges19:20 Jare jókuae ndechi jei chupe: —Chemboyerovia yae kuae reyu vae. Che tayemoambeko opaete reipota vae re. Ngaraa amaeño repɨta reke kuae oka pe.
Judges19:21 Jare ndechi güɨraja reta jo pe
Judges19:22 Ërei ovɨakatu yae ma ñogüɨnoi yave
Judges19:23 Ërei o iya oë jei chupe reta: —¡Agüɨye cherëtara reta! Pomoñera ¡Agüɨye peyapo ikavimbae yae vae kuae kuimbae pe
Judges19:24 Mase
Judges19:25 Ërei jókuae kuimbae reta mbaetɨ oyeapɨsaka ndechi re. Jayave jókuae levita oipɨɨ jembireko jare güɨnoe chupe reta ikatu pe. Jare oyapo reta ipɨa jemimbota chupe opaete jókuae pɨ̈tu köe regua
Judges19:26 Köe ma ou yave kuña ou ndechi jo jöke pe
Judges19:27 Jare ndeimbove ime opüa oipea öke oë ojo vaerä yave
Judges19:28 Jayave jei chupe: —Epüa jare yaja mo. Ërei jae mbaetɨ iñee omoë. Jayave jae oupi jare oñono jëogüegüe imburika re
Judges19:29 Ojo oväe jëta pe yave oipɨɨ metei kɨse jare opa omboyao yao jembireko jëogüegüe iyoapɨa pɨa rupi
Judges19:30 Opaete jókuae oecha vae
Judges20:1 Jayave opaete Israel iñemuña reta ñogüɨnoe
Judges20:2 Jare opaete tëta reta juvicha reta ñogüɨnoi Tumpa imbae vae reta iyemboatɨa pe
Judges20:3 Jare Benjamín iñemuña pegua reta oikuaa Israel iñemuña reta yogüeru Mizpa pe. Jare Israel iñemuña reta oparandu jókuae levita pe
Judges20:4 Jayave levita
Judges20:5 Ërei opüa cheré jókuae pɨ̈tu Gabaa pegua reta
Judges20:6 Jayave che aipɨɨ cherembireko jëogüegüe opa amboyao yao
Judges20:7 Añave opaete Israel iñemuña reta kuae pe peï vae
Judges20:8 Jayave opaete vae reta metei rami iyemongeta
Judges20:9 Kuae yayapota añave
Judges20:10 Opaete ñemuña güi oyeekɨta cien vae güi payandepo kuimbae
Judges20:11 Opaete Israel iñemuña reta oyomboatɨ metei rami oporepeña vaerä tëta guasu re.
Judges20:12 Jare omondo ñee jerajaa reta opaete ɨvɨ rupi
Judges20:13 Pemee orepo pe jókuae jeko kavimbae reta
Judges20:14 Ërei ngatu tëta guasu reta Benjamín iñemuña pegua oyomboatɨ Gabaa pe
Judges20:15 Jare Benjamín iñemuña tëta guasu reta güi oyomboatɨ vae
Judges20:16 Jókuae seteciento kuimbae reta oyeparavogüe
Judges20:17 Jare Israel iñemuña reta oyepapa vi
Judges20:18 Jaɨkue rupi opüa Israel iñemuña reta jare yogüɨraja Bet-el pe
Judges20:19 Jare Israel iñemuña reta opüa ndeimbove yogüɨraja oyembojeyupa Gabaa jóvai.
Judges20:20 Jare ñogüɨnoe oñeraro Benjamín iñemuña reta ndive; oyeapo kavi reta oñeraro vaerä Gabaa iyɨpɨ pe.
Judges20:21 Jayave ñogüɨnoe Gabaa güi Benjamín iñemuña reta; opa oyuka jókuae ara veintidó mil kuimbae Israel iñemuña pegua reta.
Judges20:22 Ërei oñemoäta ngatu ye opaete vae
Judges20:23 Echa Israel iñemuña reta yogüɨraja oyaeo yandeYa jóvai pɨ̈tu regua
Judges20:24 Jare Israel iñemuña reta yogüɨraja ye Benjamín iñemuña reta pe
Judges20:25 Ërei jókuae ara jekuae Benjamín iñemuña reta ñogüɨnoe ye Gabaa güi chupe reta jare jekuae oyuka ye ïru dieciocho mil kuimbae ñeraro regua reta.
Judges20:26 Jayave yogüɨraja ye opaete Israel iñemuña reta jare opaete tëta
Judges20:27 Jare Israel iñemuña reta oparandu yandeYa pe (echa käjou morogüɨrökuavee päve pegua oï joko pe jókuae ara
Judges20:28 jare sacerdote Finees
Judges20:29 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta oñemi kavi okätɨro ñogüɨnoi tëta Gabaa ikupe rupi.
Judges20:30 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta yogüɨraja ye Benjamín iñemuña reta pe mboapɨa ara pe
Judges20:31 Jare jekuae Benjamín iñemuña reta ñogüɨnoe ye oövaiti tovaicho reta
Judges20:32 Jare Benjamín iñemuña pegua reta jei: “Ñamoamɨri reta ye tenonde yave rami.” Ërei Israel iñemuña reta jei: “Yatekuarai
Judges20:33 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta opaete opüa oñemi kavi okätɨro ñogüɨnoia güi jare oyeapo kavi reta Baal-tamar pe
Judges20:34 Jare oporepeña reta Gabaa re diez mil kuimbae oyeparavo Israel iñemuña reta ipɨte güi vae. Jare jeiete ñeraro
Judges20:35 Jare yandeYa omee Israel iñemuña reta pe omoamɨri vaerä Benjamín iñemuña reta
Judges20:36 Jayave Benjamín iñemuña reta oecha iñamɨri opɨta. Echa Israel iñemuña pegua reta otekuarai ñeraro güi rami oyeapo
Judges20:37 Jókuae kuimbae reta opüa tëta Gabaa re iparanoe jare oyuka kɨsepuku pe opaete tëta guasu pegua.
Judges20:38 Echa kuimbae oñemi kavi okätɨro ñogüɨnoi tëta ikupe rupi vae reta omombeu Israel iñemuña reta pe ikañɨmaa vaerä tätati ɨvate opüa vae rupi
Judges20:39 Israel iñemuña reta jeiete oñemoñauka Benjamín iñemuña reta pe yave treinta kuimbae rupi omano; jayave jei reta: “Jaema ñamoamɨri tenonde yave rami.”
Judges20:40 Jökorai yave omboɨpɨ oyekuaa tätati tëta guasu kotɨ
Judges20:41 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta oporepeña jovaicho reta re
Judges20:42 Otekuarai reta tëi Israel iñemuña reta güi ñuu kotɨ tape ojo vae rupi
Judges20:43 Jökorai opa oimama reta Benjamín iñemuña reta jare oaɨkuemoña opa regua oyuka Menúha güive Gabaa güi kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ regua.
Judges20:44 Jare Benjamín iñemuña pegua reta omano dieciocho mil kuimbae ñeraro regua reta.
Judges20:45 Ïru reta oyerova otekuarai ñuu kotɨ ɨ̈vavira Rimón kotɨ
Judges20:46 Benjamín iñemuña reta ñeraro regua omano veinticinco mil kuimbae.
Judges20:47 Ërei seisciento Benjamín iñemuña reta otekuarai ñuu kotɨ ɨ̈vavira Rimón pe; joko pe yogüɨreko irundɨ yasɨ.
Judges20:48 Jare Israel iñemuña reta oporepeña ïru Benjamín iñemuña reta re jare oyuka reta kɨsepuku pe opaete kuimbae tëta guasu ñavo
Judges21:1 Israel iñemuña reta jei yepe Tumpa jee re Mizpa pe
Judges21:2 Ërei oyemboatɨ reta Bet-el pe jare ñogüɨnoi reta Tumpa jóvai pɨ̈tu regua
Judges21:3 “¡OreYa
Judges21:4 Pɨareve pe Israel iñemuña reta opüa ndeimboveasɨ
Judges21:5 Jare oparandu reta oyoupe: “¿Kia pa yandegüi reta mbaetɨ oï yandepɨte pe yayemboatɨ yave Mizpa pe?” Echa jei reta
Judges21:6 Ipɨatɨtɨ yae Israel iñemuña reta
Judges21:7 ¿Mbae pa yayapota yandepuere vaerä ñaväe kuña Benjamín iñemuña reta oimeño oikove vae reta peguarä? Echa yande reta yae ma Tumpa jee re agüɨye vaerä yanderayɨ reta omenda jae reta ndive.
Judges21:8 ¿Oime pa kia nunga Israel iñemuña pegua mbaetɨ ojo yandeYa jóvai Mizpa pe yandeatɨ yave vae?” Jayave imaendúa reta Jabes-galaad pegua reta mbaetɨ metei ave yogüɨraja yemboatɨa pe vae re
Judges21:9 echa tee reta oenɨi yave
Judges21:10 Jayave opaete vae omondo doce mil kuimbae jëia vae reta oyuka vaerä kɨsepuku pe Jabes-galaad pegua reta
Judges21:11 
Judges21:12 Jare Jabes-galaad pegua reta ipɨte pe oväe reta cuatrociento kuñatai ndeiño etei oasa kuimbae ndive vae
Judges21:13 Jayave opaete vae reta
Judges21:14 Benjamín iñemuña reta yogüeru
Judges21:15 Jare Israel iñemuña reta pegua reta pe paravete Benjamín iñemuña reta
Judges21:16 Jayave tëta pegua tenondegua vae reta jei: “¿Kërai pa yandepuereta ñaväe kuña jókuae oata vae reta peguarä? Echa opa ko omano ikuña reta.
Judges21:17 Benjamín agüɨye tokañɨ Israel iñemuña ipɨte güi
Judges21:18 Ërei yande mbaetɨ yandepuere yanderayɨ reta ñamee jembireko retarä; echa opaete yande Israel iñemuña
Judges21:19 Ërei ngatu oime año ñavo arete tuicha vae oyeapo Silo pe yandeYa peguarä
Judges21:20 Jayave Israel iñemuña itenondegua reta omondo ñee Benjamín iñemuña reta pe
Judges21:21 jare peïndaivi peï. Jare peecha kuñatai reta ñogüɨnoe opɨrae yave
Judges21:22 Jare kuñatai reta tu ani ikɨvɨ reta yogüeru iñeengeta jese oreve yave
Judges21:23 Benjamín iñemuña reta oyapo jókuae jei reta chupe vae
Judges21:24 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta opa vi yogüɨraja ye joko güi
Judges21:25 Jókuae ara rupi mbaetɨ vɨteri mburuvicha guasu Israel pe
Ruth1:1 Arakae mburuvicha oporoepɨ vae reta yogüɨreko yave
Ruth1:2 Jókuae kuimbae ko jee Elimelec
Ruth1:3 Jare omano Elimelec
Ruth1:4 Kuae reta omenda kuña Moab pegua reta ndive; metei jee Orfa jare ïru jee Rut; joko pe yogüɨreko payandepo año.
Ruth1:5 Jare omano vi Mahlón jare Quelión; jökorai Noemí opɨta iyangarekoambae
Ruth1:6 Jayave oyemongeta oyerova ye vaerä imembɨtatɨgüe reta ndive ɨvɨ Moab güi; echa jërakua chupe
Ruth1:7 Jayave oë jókuae oikosea güi
Ruth1:8 jare Noemí jei imembɨtatɨgüe reta pe: —Pekua ye pesɨ pɨri; yandeYa togüɨnoi mboroparareko pekotɨ
Ruth1:9 YandeYa tomee peve peiko kavi ye vaerä peme jëta pe. Javoi oovapɨte imembɨtatɨgüe reta
Ruth1:10 jare jei reta chupe: —¡Ngaraa! ¡Ore rojota ko nde ndive ndeɨvɨ kotɨ!
Ruth1:11 Jare Noemí jekuae jei ye: —Pekua ye chemembɨ reta
Ruth1:12 Pekua ye chemembɨ reta; echa che
Ruth1:13 ¿peärota pa opa okuakuaa regua? ¿Peärota pa pekueraimbae reve jae reta peaɨu jeko pegua? Ngaraa ko pepuere chemembɨ reta; che ko anoi mbɨatɨtɨ tuicha yae pegüi
Ruth1:14 Jare jae reta jekuae oyaeo ye. Jökorai Orfa oñemokɨ̈reɨ oyerova ye vaerä jare oovapɨte imesɨgüe jare ojo
Ruth1:15 Jare Noemí jei chupe: —Mase
Ruth1:16 Ërei Rut jei chupe: —¡Agüɨye chemoñera roeya vaerä jare asɨrɨ vaerä ndegüi! Nde reoa rupi
Ruth1:17 Nde remanoa pe
Ruth1:18 Jayave Noemí oecha Rut ikɨ̈reɨ yae ojo jupíe
Ruth1:19 jayave mókoi reve yogüɨraja Belén kotɨ. Jare opa ma yogüɨraja oväe Belén pe yave
Ruth1:20 Jare Noemí jei chupe reta: —Agüɨye mo chereenɨi Noemí pe
Ruth1:21 Che aja kuae güi yerovia ndive
Ruth1:22 Körai Noemí oyerova ye ɨvɨ Moab güi imembɨtatɨgüe Rut ndive; jare yogüeru oväe Belén pe
Ruth2:1 Noemí güɨnoi ime amɨri Elimelec jëtaragüe
Ruth2:2 Metei ara Rut Moab pegua jei Noemí pe: —Romoñera remaeño vaerä aja kó pe ayevɨka
Ruth2:3 Jayave ojo
Ruth2:4 Jókuae ara etei Booz ou oväe Belén güi
Ruth2:5 Jare Booz jei jembiokuai ombaepoo vae reta itenondegua pe: —¿Kia jëtara pa kuae kuñatai?
Ruth2:6 Jare tembiokuai
Ruth2:7 Jae jei cheve: “Romoñera remaeño vaerä ayevɨka jare amboatɨ ombaepoo vae reta jaɨkue.” Jare oike ndeimbove güive kuae ora regua oputuumbae etei michi pegua yepe.
Ruth2:8 Jayave Booz jei Rut pe: —Eyeapɨsaka
Ruth2:9 emae kavi kia kó pe ma ombaepoo vae reta ñogüɨnoi vae re jare ekua jaɨkue reta; echa ayókuai ma tembiokuai reta agüɨye vaerä mbae jei ndeve jare ndeɨuve yave
Ruth2:10 Jayave jae itindɨasɨ ɨvɨ re
Ruth2:11 Jare Booz jei chupe: —Aikuaa opaete reyapo nemesɨgüe ndive
Ruth2:12 ¡YandeYa tomboekovia ndeve opaete nderembiapo rupi! ¡Jare tandeangareko yandeYa Tumpa Israel pegua
Ruth2:13 Jare jae jei: —Cheya
Ruth2:14 Jare Booz jei chupe
Ruth2:15 Javoi opüa ye oyevɨka vaerä. Jare Booz oyókuai jembiokuai reta jei reve: —Toyevɨka vi oyeokuagüe reta ipɨte rupi jare agüɨye pemomaraiuka;
Ruth2:16 jare pemaeñota vi oa chupe mbovɨ katu mi
Ruth2:17 Jayave oyevɨka kó pe pɨ̈tu regua
Ruth2:18 Jare ojo ye tëta guasu kotɨ ivoɨta ndive; jare imesɨgüe oecha kuae oyevɨkagüe
Ruth2:19 Jare imesɨgüe oparandu chupe: —¿Kia pe pa reyevɨka añave? ¿Kia pe pa jeta mbatee reyevɨka? ¡Toiko kavi jókuae ndeparareko vae! Jare Rut imiari imesɨgüe pe
Ruth2:20 Jare Noemí jei imembɨtatɨgüe pe: —¡YandeYa tiporerekua jese! Jae ipɨakavi yandeve añave
Ruth2:21 Jare Rut Moab pegua jei: —Javoi jei vi cheve: Eyea cherembiokuai kuña reta ndive
Ruth2:22 Jayave Noemí jei imembɨtatɨgüe pe: —Ikavi yae ko chemembɨ
Ruth2:23 Jayave jekuaeño opɨta Booz jembiokuai kuña reta ndive oyevɨka vaerä
Ruth3:1 Jókuae güire Noemí jei Rut pe: —Chemembɨ
Ruth3:2 Booz jae ko orerëtara
Ruth3:3 Jayave eyau
Ruth3:4 Jare emae kavi jese ketɨ ra oyapakuata oke vae
Ruth3:5 Jare Rut jei chupe: —Tayapo opaete nde cheokuai vae.
Ruth3:6 Jayave ojo kó kotɨ jare oyapo opaete imesɨgüe oyókuai rami.
Ruth3:7 Jare Booz opa ma okaru jare oɨu yave
Ruth3:8 Jare pɨare mbɨte ma yave
Ruth3:9 Jayave Booz oparandu chupe: —¿Kia pa nde? Jare Rut jei chupe: —Che ko Rut nderembiokuai
Ruth3:10 Jayave Booz jei: —¡YandeYa tiporerekua nderé! Ikavi vae ko reyapo tenonde reyapo vae güi. Ndepuere tëi reeka kuimbae taɨrusu vae
Ruth3:11 Ërei
Ruth3:12 Mase
Ruth3:13 Añave neköe kuae pe
Ruth3:14 Jare oke güire itɨma rupi köe regua
Ruth3:15 Javoi jei chupe: —Eru reñeapeva pɨpe vae
Ruth3:16 Jare ou ye ma oväe yave
Ruth3:17 Jare jei: —Kuae cebada omee cheve
Ruth3:18 Jayave Noemí jei: —Chemembɨ
Ruth4:1 Jayave Booz ojo oguapɨ tëta guasu jöke yemboatɨa renda pe; jare ko ou jókuae kuimbae
Ruth4:2 Jayave jae oenɨi payandepo kuimbae reta
Ruth4:3 Javoi Booz jei jókuae jëtara pe: —Noemí ou ye ɨvɨ Moab güi vae
Ruth4:4 Jare ayemongeta aikuaauka vaerä ndeve
Ruth4:5 Jayave Booz jei ye chupe: —Ɨvɨ regua yave Noemí güi
Ruth4:6 Jayave Booz jëtara jei: —Jökorai ko yave
Ruth4:7 Jókuae ara rupi Israel pe teko jae ko
Ruth4:8 Jayave Booz jëtara jei: —Nde egua. Jare omboi ipɨapaa omee chupe.
Ruth4:9 Jare Booz jei tenondegua reta pe jare opaete joko pe ñogüɨnoi vae reta pe: —Opaete perovake ayapo kuae; Noemí güi agua aï opaete Elimelec amɨri iɨvɨ jare opaete Quelión jare Mahlón imbae.
Ruth4:10 Jare arekota vi cherembirekorä Rut
Ruth4:11 Jare tenondegua reta jare opaete joko pe ñogüɨnoi vae reta jei: —Orerovake ko reyapo. ¡YandeYa toyapo ndeve jókuae kuña oiketa ndero pe vae Raquel jare Lea rami
Ruth4:12 Jare neñemuña toiko Fares iñemuña rami. Fares ko jae Tamar imembɨ
Ruth4:13 Booz güɨreko Rut
Ruth4:14 Jare kuña reta jei Noemí pe: —Toyemboeteuka yandeYa
Ruth4:15 kuae oikota ndemoingove katu vaerä jare ndeangareko vaerä netɨ̈aro yae ma yave; echa nemembɨtatɨgüe nderaɨu yae vae imembɨ ko
Ruth4:16 Jare Noemí oipɨɨ michia raɨ
Ruth4:17 Jare jëta iyɨpɨ pegua reta ombojee
Ruth4:18 Kuae ko jae Fares iñemuña reta: Fares taɨ jae ko Hezrón;
Ruth4:19 Hezrón taɨ ko Ram
Ruth4:20 Aminadab taɨ ko Naasón; Naasón taɨ ko Salmón;
Ruth4:21 Salmón taɨ ko Booz; Booz taɨ ko Obed;
Ruth4:22 Obed taɨ ko Isaí; jare Isaí taɨ
1Samuel1:1 Oiko metei kuimbae Ramataim Zofim pegua pe
1Samuel1:2 Jare Elcana mókoi jembireko. Metei jee Ana
1Samuel1:3 Año ñavo jókuae kuimbae ojo jëta güi tëta Silo jee vae pe ombaemboete vaerä jare omee vaerä mɨmba oyeyukagüe yandeYa imbaepuere yae ete vae pe. Jókuae mókoi Elí taɨ yogüɨrekoa pe
1Samuel1:4 Jare Elcana omee mɨmba oyeyukagüe yave
1Samuel1:5 Ërei Ana pe omee oiparavo kavigüe; echa oaɨu yae
1Samuel1:6 Jare iñemɨi Penina omoambeko avei
1Samuel1:7 Jökorai año ñavo omoambeko avei; ojo yandeYa jo kotɨ yave; jáeramo Ana oyaeo jare okarúä.
1Samuel1:8 Jare ime Elcana jei chupe: “Ana
1Samuel1:9 Jare tëta Silo pe Ana oï yave
1Samuel1:10 Ana oyemboasɨ katu yae reve oyerure yandeYa pe
1Samuel1:11 Jare oyapo ñererökuavee jei reve: “CheYa imbaepuere yae ete vae
1Samuel1:12 Jare jae ɨma yae oyerure yandeYa jóvai jeko pegua
1Samuel1:13 ërei Ana oyerure ipɨa peño
1Samuel1:14 Jayave Elí jei chupe: —¿Kërai yave regua pa resavaɨpota reï? ¡Ekuera mo vino güi!
1Samuel1:15 Jare Ana jei chupe: —Mbaetɨ ko jökorai cheru. Che jae ko metei kuña oiporara yae oiko vae; mbaetɨ jau vino ani mbae oporombosavaɨpo vae ave
1Samuel1:16 Agüɨye eyemongeta che nderembiokuai kuña jeko kavimbae ko vae; chepɨa kavimbae jare chepɨatɨtɨ yae vae re ko jekuae güɨrave chemiari aï.
1Samuel1:17 Elí jei chupe: —Ekua mbɨakatu ndive jare Israel iTumpa tomee ndeve reiporu chupe vae.
1Samuel1:18 Jare jae jei: —Yasoropai tuicha. Jare Ana ojo ye ouä rupi
1Samuel1:19 Jare ndeimbove yave opüa omboete reta yandeYa
1Samuel1:20 Ana ipurúa
1Samuel1:21 Jaɨkue rupi Elcana ojo opaete jo pegua reta ndive omee vaerä mɨmba oyeyukagüe yandeYa pe
1Samuel1:22 Ërei Ana mbaetɨ ojo
1Samuel1:23 Jare ime Elcana jei chupe: —Eyapo jaekavita ndeve vae
1Samuel1:24 Jare ombokambu poi güire
1Samuel1:25 Oyuka reta toro taɨrusu vae
1Samuel1:26 Jare Ana jei Elí pe: —¡Chekɨvɨ! Mase
1Samuel1:27 Kuae kunumi raɨ re ko ayerurese aiko
1Samuel1:28 Añave
1Samuel2:1 Ana oyerure
1Samuel2:2 ¡Mbaetɨ kia iyoambae nde rami cheYa! ¡Echa mbaetɨ yé kia nde rami! ¡Jare mbaetɨ kia oporoepɨ nde oreTumpa rami!
1Samuel2:3 Agüɨye kia timiari ipɨayemboete reve
1Samuel2:4 Jae omboai imbaepuere vae reta jembiporu ñeraro pegua jare omborɨ ipuerembae reta;
1Samuel2:5 tenonde yave jɨ̈vɨatase vae reta
1Samuel2:6 YandeYa oekɨ tekove
1Samuel2:7 YandeYa yandembou yandeparavete vaerä ani yaikokatu vaerä; jae oporomomichi ani jae oporombotuicha.
1Samuel2:8 Jae güɨnoe paravete vae mbaravete güi
1Samuel2:9 Jae oyangareko jupi rupi oiko chupe vae re
1Samuel2:10 YandeYa omoamɨrita jovaicho reta
1Samuel2:11 Jare Elcana ojo ye jëta kotɨ Ramá pe
1Samuel2:12 Elí taɨ reta ko iyoa
1Samuel2:13 Jae reta köraiñoi oyapo tëta pegua reta: Kia nunga güeru mɨmba oyeyukagüe omee yandeYa pe yave
1Samuel2:14 jare omopöe jókuae tɨ̈ai yapepo pe
1Samuel2:15 Jaeramiño vi ikɨragüe ndei oyeapɨ mbove mɨmba oyeyukagüe oyeapɨ jese vae re
1Samuel2:16 Jare jókuae kuimbae jei yave chupe: “Toyeapɨ räri ikɨragüe jare jaɨkue rupi eraja nde reipota vae.” Jayave tembiokuai jei: “¡Emee cheve añave voi! Echa mbaetɨ remee yave apɨ̈rota ndegüi.”
1Samuel2:17 Jökorai tuicha yae iyoa kuae kunumi reta yandeYa kotɨ
1Samuel2:18 Ërei kunumi raɨ Samuel oyeokuai yandeYa pe
1Samuel2:19 Jare ichɨ oyapo chupe metei temimonde michi raɨ vae
1Samuel2:20 Jayave Elí jei ñee kavi Elcana re jare jembireko re
1Samuel2:21 Jare yandeYa iporerekua Ana re. Opaete reve imembɨ mboapɨ kunumi mókoi kuñatai; jare kunumi Samuel okuakuaa yandeYa jóvai.
1Samuel2:22 Ërei Elí
1Samuel2:23 Jare jae jei taɨ reta pe: “¿Maera pa peyapo ikavimbae yae vae? Aendu opaete kuae tëta rupi ikavimbae yae peyapo vae.
1Samuel2:24 Agüɨye
1Samuel2:25 Metei kuimbae iyoa yave japicha kotɨ
1Samuel2:26 Ërei kunumi Samuel jekuae okuakuaa jare jekuaeñoi omboyerovia yandeYa jare vi kuimbae reta.
1Samuel2:27 Jare ou metei kuimbae Tumpa iñeemombeúa Elí pɨri jare jei chupe: “Körai jei yandeYa: ‘Peñemuñagüe reta oyeokuai yogüɨreko Faraón jo pe Egipto pe yave
1Samuel2:28 Jare che aiparavo chesacerdoterä Israel iñemuña reta ipɨte güi
1Samuel2:29 ¿Maera pa omboeteä mbota reta jare mɨmba oyeyukagüe oñemee cheve o yemboatɨ renda jöke pe vae? ¿Maera pa rembotenonde chegüi nderaɨ reta
1Samuel2:30 Jáeramo
1Samuel2:31 Mase
1Samuel2:32 Reechata neñemuña reta oiporara
1Samuel2:33 Kuimbae nerëtara reta oyeokuai mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae pe amoembɨre vae
1Samuel2:34 Kuae oikota ikañɨmaa ndeve vaerä
1Samuel2:35 Jare che aiparavota metei chesacerdoterä jupi rupi oiko vae
1Samuel2:36 Jayave neñemuña güi opɨtaño vae outa oyetavatɨka oñemomichi reve sacerdote jóvai korepoti re
1Samuel3:1 Kunumi Samuel oyeokuai yandeYa pe Elí jóvai. Jókuae ara rupi yandeYa iñee mbaetɨ oyeendu
1Samuel3:2 Ërei metei pɨ̈tu Elí oyapakua oï jupa pe; jesa omboɨpɨ ma ogüe
1Samuel3:3 Samuel oke oï yandeYa jo pe
1Samuel3:4 yandeYa oenɨi: —¡Samuel! —¡Ko aï! —jei Samuel.
1Samuel3:5 Jare osɨi ojo Elí oïa pe
1Samuel3:6 Jare yandeYa jekuae oenɨi ye: —¡Samuel! Jare Samuel opüa ojo ye Elí oïa pe
1Samuel3:7 Jare Samuel mbaetɨ vɨteri yepe oikuaa yandeYa
1Samuel3:8 YandeYa jekuae oenɨi ye Samuel mboapɨa ma. Jare jae opüa ojo Elí kotɨ
1Samuel3:9 jare jei Samuel pe: —Ekua eyapakua
1Samuel3:10 Jare ou yandeYa oyemboɨ
1Samuel3:11 Jare yandeYa jei Samuel pe: —Mase
1Samuel3:12 Jókuae ara che ambopota cheñee Elí kotɨ
1Samuel3:13 Che amombeu chupe aiporarauka vaerä iñemuña reta pe jekuae avei pegua
1Samuel3:14 Jáeramo
1Samuel3:15 Jare Samuel oyapakua oke köe regua
1Samuel3:16 Elí oenɨi Samuel jare jei chupe: —¡Cheraɨ Samuel! —¡Ko aï! —jei chupe.
1Samuel3:17 Jare Elí jei: —¿Mbae pa jei yandeYa ndeve? Romoñera agüɨye vaerä reikuaku chegüi. ¡Tumpa täta toiporarauka ndeve
1Samuel3:18 Jare Samuel omombeu chupe opaete
1Samuel3:19 Jare Samuel okuakuaa
1Samuel3:20 Jare opaete Israel iñemuña reta
1Samuel3:21 Jare yandeYa oyekuaa ye Samuel pe tëta Silo pe; echa joko pe yandeYa omombeu chupe iñee.
1Samuel4:1 Jare Samuel imiari opaete Israel iñemuña reta pe. Jókuae ara rupi Israel iñemuña reta ñogüɨnoe oövaiti filisteo reta
1Samuel4:2 jare filisteo reta opüa Israel iñemuña reta re; omboɨpɨ oñoraro reta
1Samuel4:3 Yogüeru ye ma ñeraroa güi teyupa pe yave
1Samuel4:4 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta omondo güeru Silo güi
1Samuel4:5 Jare yandeYa ikäjou morogüɨrökuavee päve pegua güeru güɨroväe teyupa pe yave
1Samuel4:6 Jare filisteo reta oendu yave jókuae sapúkai täta yae vae
1Samuel4:7 filisteo reta omboɨpɨ okɨɨye
1Samuel4:8 ¿Këraita pa yaiko? ¿Kia pa yandereepɨta kuae Tumpa imbaepuere yae vae güi? ¡Jae ko jókuae Tumpa Egiptoɨgua reta oyuka ñuu rupi oipotagüe mbaerasɨ pɨ̈chɨi pe vae!
1Samuel4:9 ¡Peñemoäta ngatu filisteo reta
1Samuel4:10 Jayave filisteo reta oñeraro jare omoamɨri Israel iñemuña reta
1Samuel4:11 Jare Tumpa ikäjou opɨ̈ro jare güɨraja reta
1Samuel4:12 Jare jókuae ñeraroa güi otekuarai metei kuimbae Benjamín iñemuña pegua
1Samuel4:13 Ou oväe yave
1Samuel4:14 Jare Elí oendu yave tëta guasu pegua reta jäsémbai
1Samuel4:15 Elí güɨnoi ma noventa y ocho año
1Samuel4:16 Jókuae kuimbae jei Elí pe: —Ayu ramoete aväe. Atekuarai kuae ara ñeraroa güi. —¿Maratu pa cheraɨ? —jei Elí.
1Samuel4:17 Jare ñee jerúa jei: —Israel iñemuña reta otekuarai filisteo reta güi
1Samuel4:18 Jare Elí oendu yave Tumpa ikäjou regua
1Samuel4:19 Jare taɨtatɨ
1Samuel4:20 Omae jese vae reta oecha omanota yave jei chupe: “Agüɨye ekɨɨye
1Samuel4:21 Jare jókuae michia raɨ ombojee Icabod
1Samuel4:22 Jare jae jei: “Tumpa iyemboetea oñepɨ̈ro Israel iñemuña reta güi; echa Tumpa ikäjou opɨ̈rouka reta.”
1Samuel5:1 Filisteo reta opɨ̈ro Tumpa ikäjou yave
1Samuel5:2 jare güɨroike reta Tumpa ikäjou itumpa Dagón tupao pe
1Samuel5:3 Pɨareve ndeimbove pe Asdod pegua reta oecha itumpa Dagón oyepɨso oï ɨvɨ pe yandeYa ikäjou jóvai
1Samuel5:4 Pɨareve pe oecha reta ye itumpa Dagón jekuae yepɨso ɨvɨ pe yandeYa ikäjou jóvai
1Samuel5:5 Kuae jeko pegua Dagón isacerdote reta jare opaete oike Dagón itupao pe vae reta
1Samuel5:6 Jare yandeYa imbaepuere oiporarauka Asdod pegua reta pe
1Samuel5:7 Kuae oecha yave Asdod pegua reta
1Samuel5:8 Jare omboatɨ reta opaete filisteo juvicha reta
1Samuel5:9 Jare güɨraja reta oeya Gat pe yave
1Samuel5:10 Jayave güɨroyakavo reta yandeYa ikäjou tëta Ecrón pe
1Samuel5:11 Jare omboatɨ reta opaete filisteo juvicha reta
1Samuel5:12 Jare oikoveño vae reta
1Samuel6:1 YandeYa ikäjou oiko filisteo reta iɨvɨ pe chiu yasɨ.
1Samuel6:2 Jayave filisteo reta oenɨi sacerdote reta jare maratuta vae imombeúa reta
1Samuel6:3 Jae reta jei: —Pemondo ye Tumpa ikäjou yave
1Samuel6:4 Jare jae reta oparandu: —¿Mbae nunga mbota pa romondota? Jare sacerdote reta jei: —Pemondo pandepo mbaerasɨ pɨ̈chɨi ñakɨ̈ta vae iä oro pegua jare pandepo anguya iä oro pegua
1Samuel6:5 Peyapo pire mbaerasɨ ñakɨ̈ta vae iä jare anguya reta iä
1Samuel6:6 ¿Maera pa pepɨa täta Faraón jare Egiptoɨgua reta rami? Tumpa oiporarauka chupe reta yave jaɨkue rupi mbaetɨ omaeño yogüɨraja reta.
1Samuel6:7 Añave peyapo metei käretou ipɨau vae
1Samuel6:8 Peipɨɨ Tumpa ikäjou jare peñono käretou pe
1Samuel6:9 Jare pemae peï jese; jare tape ojo Bet-semes kotɨ vae rupi ojo yave iɨvɨ ae pe
1Samuel6:10 Jare jókuae kuimbae reta jökorai oyapo
1Samuel6:11 Jare oñono reta pɨpe yandeYa ikäjou jare anguya reta iä
1Samuel6:12 Jare jókuae guaka reta yogüɨraja tape rupi Bet-semes kotɨ ojo vae rupi
1Samuel6:13 Jare Bet-semes pegua reta oipoo ñogüɨnoi trigo ɨvɨtɨ päu ipe kavi vae pe
1Samuel6:14 Jókuae käretou ou oväe Josué iko pe
1Samuel6:15 Jare Leví iñemuña reta ombogüeyɨ yandeYa ikäjou jare mbae jɨru iyɨke pe oï vae
1Samuel6:16 Jókuae pandepo filisteo juvicha reta oecha yave jókuae oyeapogüe
1Samuel6:17 Jókuae pandepo mbaerasɨ pɨ̈chɨi ñakɨ̈ta vae iä oro pegua filisteo reta omondo yandeYa pe iyoa oyemboai vaerä vae; jae ko tëta Asdod re
1Samuel6:18 Omondo reta vi pandepo anguya iä reta oro pegua jókuae pandepo filisteo juvicha reta jëta guasu reta re; tëta guasu oñekëse kavi vae jare tëta raɨ reta oñekësembae vae re. Jókuae ita guasu Josué iko pe oï Bet-semes pe vae
1Samuel6:19 Jayave yandeYa oyuka jókuae kuimbae reta Bet-semes pegua reta
1Samuel6:20 Jayave Bet-semes pegua reta jei: “¿Kia pa ipuere oï yandeYa Tumpa iyoambae jóvai? ¿Ketɨ pa yamondota Tumpa ikäjou yandegüi?”
1Samuel6:21 Jare omondo reta ñee jerajaa reta Quiriat-jearim pegua reta pe jei reve: “Filisteo reta ombou ye yandeYa ikäjou; jayave peyu peraja.”
1Samuel7:1 Jayave yogüeru Quiriat-jearim pegua reta jare güɨraja yandeYa ikäjou
1Samuel7:2 YandeYa ikäjou oyereru güire Quiriat-jearim pe
1Samuel7:3 Samuel imiari Israel iñemuña reta pe
1Samuel7:4 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta oekɨ omombo Baal iä reta
1Samuel7:5 Jare Samuel jei: “Pemboatɨ opaete tëta Israel iñemuña reta Mizpa pe
1Samuel7:6 Jare oyomboatɨ reta Mizpa pe jare güeru reta ɨ opɨyere yandeYa jóvai mbotarä
1Samuel7:7 Jare filisteo reta oikuaa yave Israel iñemuña reta ñogüɨnoi Mizpa pe
1Samuel7:8 Jayave jei reta Samuel pe: “Agüɨye tosondo ndeyerure yandeYa Tumpa pe oreré
1Samuel7:9 Jare Samuel oipɨɨ vecha kuimbae raɨ okambuño vae
1Samuel7:10 Jare Samuel omee oï ramboeve mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae
1Samuel7:11 Jare ñogüɨnoe Israel iñemuña reta oaɨkuemoña jare oyuka filisteo reta Mizpa güive Bet-car pe ojo oväe regua.
1Samuel7:12 Javoi Samuel oipɨɨ metei ita jare oñono Mizpa jare tëta Sen jee vae ipäu pe
1Samuel7:13 Jare jökorai filisteo reta mbaetɨ ma yogüeru oike Israel iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe
1Samuel7:14 Jare Israel iñemuña reta opɨ̈ro ye filisteo reta güi iɨvɨ
1Samuel7:15 Jare Samuel oiko Israel iñemuña reta juvicharä opaete ara oikove oiko ramboeve
1Samuel7:16 jare año ñavo ojo oguata Bet-el rupi
1Samuel7:17 Jókuae jaɨkue rupi ou ye Ramá pe jo güɨnoia pe
1Samuel8:1 Samuel indechi ma yave
1Samuel8:2 Taɨrɨpɨ jee Joel
1Samuel8:3 Ërei mbaetɨ omomoe reta tu jeko
1Samuel8:4 Jayave opaete Israel iñemuña reta itenondegua reta oyomboatɨ jare yogüeru reta Ramá pe
1Samuel8:5 jei reta chupe: “Mase
1Samuel8:6 Ërei Samuel pe mbaetɨ jaekavi jókuae mburuvicha jae reta oiporu vae. Jare Samuel oyerure yandeYa pe.
1Samuel8:7 Jare yandeYa jei Samuel pe: “Eendu opaete vae reta jei ndeve vae; echa ndeä ko nereröɨro reta
1Samuel8:8 Egipto güi anoe reta güive oyapo reta opaete mbaembae añave rupi rami
1Samuel8:9 Añave eendu iñee; ërei eechauka kavi voi chupe reta këraita ko jókuae mburuvicha guasu jeko ikotɨ reta kuri vae.”
1Samuel8:10 Jayave Samuel omombeu yandeYa iñee opaete vae pe; mburuvicha guasu oiporu chupe vae reta pe.
1Samuel8:11 Jei chupe reta: —Kuae ko oyapota jókuae peruvicha guasurä oïta vae: Güɨrajata peraɨ reta
1Samuel8:12 Jare oñonota mil vae sundaro reta juvicharä
1Samuel8:13 Jökoraiño vi perayɨ reta güɨrajata jembiokuairä: Mbae ikäti kavi vae iyapoarä
1Samuel8:14 Jae ramiño vi peɨvɨ kavi reta opata opɨ̈ro pegüi
1Samuel8:15 Peremitɨ jäɨgüe jare uva iagüe güi oekata peve pediezmo reta
1Samuel8:16 Güɨrajata omombaravɨkɨ vaerä perembiokuai kuimbae jare perembiokuai kuña reta
1Samuel8:17 Perɨmba reta güi oekɨta vi pediezmo jare pe ave peyeokuaita vi chupe.
1Samuel8:18 Jare metei ara jókuae peruvicha guasu peiparavogüe jeko peroäse ma yave
1Samuel8:19 Ërei opaete vae mbaetɨ oipota oendu Samuel iñee
1Samuel8:20 roiko vaerä vi ïru ɨvɨ pegua tëtaguasu reta rami
1Samuel8:21 Jare Samuel omombeu yandeYa pe opaete kuae ñee reta oendugüe;
1Samuel8:22 jare yandeYa jei Samuel pe: —Eendu jae reta jei vae

1Samuel9:2 Cis güɨnoi metei taɨ

1Samuel9:10 Jare Saúl jei jembiokuai pe: —Jaekavi rere
1Samuel9:11 Jare oyeupi yogüɨraja yave tëta guasu kotɨ oñoövaiti kuñatai reta yogüeru ɨ güɨraja vae ndive

1Samuel9:13 Peike yave tëta guasu pe

1Samuel9:15 Pɨareve pe ma Saúl outa yave yepe
1Samuel9:16 “Pɨareve koyave etei
1Samuel9:17 Jare Samuel oecha yave Saúl
1Samuel9:18 Jare Saúl oya katu Samuel re tëta guasu jöke pe oï yave jare jei chupe: —Romoñera remombeu vaerä cheve
1Samuel9:19 Samuel jei Saúl pe: —Che ko jae
1Samuel9:20 Jókuae mburika mboapɨ ara ma okañɨ pegüi vae
1Samuel9:21 Jayave Saúl jei: —¡Benjamín iñemuña pegua ko che
1Samuel9:22 Jayave Samuel güɨraja Saúl jare jembiokuai
1Samuel9:23 Jare Samuel jei oñemimo vae pe: —Eru jókuae amee ndeve reñono tee vaerä vae.
1Samuel9:24 Jayave oñemimo vae oekɨ metei iugüe jare oñono Saúl jóvai
1Samuel9:25 Jayave opa ye ma yogüeru ɨvɨtɨ mbaemboete renda güi tëta guasu kotɨ yave
1Samuel9:26 Jare pɨareve pe ndei köe mbove oyupavo
1Samuel9:27 Jare ñogüɨnoe reta tëta guasu güi ikatu pe yave
1Samuel10:1 Jayave Samuel oipɨɨ metei asaite jɨru jare opɨyere Saúl iñäka re
1Samuel10:2 Añave
1Samuel10:3 Javoi joko güi reasa kutɨ katu
1Samuel10:4 Jókuae reta opa oyapo maraetei ndeve güire
1Samuel10:5 Jókuae jaɨkue rupi reota reväe Tumpa iɨvɨtɨ re
1Samuel10:6 Jare Tumpa iEspíritu outa nderé mbaepuere ndive
1Samuel10:7 Jare opaete kuae mɨakañɨ reta oasa nde ndive yave
1Samuel10:8 Javoi ekua cherenonde Gilgal pe; jayave che ajata ndépɨri amee vaerä mɨmba oyeyukagüe opa etei oyeapɨ vae
1Samuel10:9 Jare Saúl oyerova Samuel oïa güi ojo ñoete Tumpa oipoepɨ ipɨa; jare opaete jókuae mɨakañɨ reta oyeapo chupe jókuae ara.
1Samuel10:10 Jare opa yogüɨraja reta oväe jókuae ɨvɨtɨ oïa pe yave
1Samuel10:11 Jare opaete tenonde rupi oikuaa Saúl vae reta oecha omombeu Tumpa iñee
1Samuel10:12 Jare amogüe reta jei: “¿Kia pa ko jae kuae reta tu?” Kuae jeko pegua opɨta ñeerä: “¿Saúl vi yera Tumpa iñeemombeúa?” jei vae.
1Samuel10:13 Jare omombeu poi Tumpa iñee
1Samuel10:14 Metei Saúl itutɨ jei chupe jare jembiokuai pe: —¿Kerupi pa peiko? Jare jae jei: —Rojo roeka mburika reta; jare mbaetɨ roväe chupe ramo rojo roväe Samuel pɨri.
1Samuel10:15 Jare Saúl itutɨ jei: —Romoñera remombeu vaerä cheve ¿mbae pa ko Samuel jei ndeve?
1Samuel10:16 Jare Saúl jei itutɨ pe: —Omombeu kavi voi oreve
1Samuel10:17 Jaɨkue rupi Samuel omboatɨuka opaete Israel iñemuña reta yandeYa jóvai
1Samuel10:18 jare jei chupe reta: —Körai jei yandeYa
1Samuel10:19 Ërei añave pe reta peröɨro peTumpa
1Samuel10:20 Jare Samuel jei oya katu vaerä opaete Israel iñemuña reta ñemuña ñavo rupi
1Samuel10:21 Jare jei oya katu vaerä Benjamín iñemuña
1Samuel10:22 Jare oparandu reta ye yandeYa pe
1Samuel10:23 Jayave osɨi reta yogüɨraja güeru joko güi; güeru reta oñono opaete vae ipɨte pe yave
1Samuel10:24 Jare Samuel jei opaete vae pe: —¿Peecha pa yandeYa oiparavogüe
1Samuel10:25 Jayave Samuel jei opaete vae jóvai mburuvicha guasu iporookuai reta regua
1Samuel10:26 Jare Samuel omondo opaete vae jëta jëta ae kotɨ. Jare Saúl ojo vi jëta kotɨ Gabaa pe

1Samuel11:1 Mburuvicha guasu Nahas Amón iñemuña pegua oporepeña tëta Jabes Galaad pegua re jare opa ojo oyembojeyupa reta. Ërei opaete Jabes pegua reta jei Nahas pe: —Eyapo ñemoïru ore ndive
1Samuel11:2 Jare Nahas jei chupe reta: —Pemaeño aekɨ peresäɨ peakatu kotɨgua yave
1Samuel11:3 Jayave Jabes pegua tenondegua vae reta jei: —Emee oreve chiu ara orepuere vaerä romondo ñee jerajaa reta opaete ɨvɨ Israel rupi; jare mbaetɨ yave kia orereepɨ vaerä
1Samuel11:4 Jare ñee jerajaa reta yogüɨraja oväe Gabaa pe Saúl oikoa pe
1Samuel11:5 Jökorai ñogüɨnoi yave Saúl ou oiko iko güi igüeye reta jaɨkue jare oparandu: —¿Maratu pa yogüɨreko vae? ¿Maera pa oyaeo reta? Omombeu reta chupe kuimbae reta Jabes pegua iñee.
1Samuel11:6 Saúl oendu yave kuae ñee reta
1Samuel11:7 Oipɨɨ oyuka mókoi güeye jare opa oyasɨa sɨa
1Samuel11:8 Jare opaete reve oyomboatɨ Bezec pe tresciento mil kuimbae Israel kotɨgua
1Samuel11:9 Jare jei jókuae ñee jerajaa yogüeru ñee omombeu vae reta ndive: —Körai pere Jabes pegua reta pe Galaad pe: “Pɨareve kuaraɨ ara mbɨte yave poepɨta.” Ñee jerajaa reta yogüɨraja jare omombeu Jabes pegua reta pe
1Samuel11:10 Jare Jabes pegua reta jei tovaicho Nahas pe. —Pɨareve roñemeeta ndepo pe
1Samuel11:11 Jare pɨareve pe

1Samuel13:1 Saúl okuakuaa ma yave omboɨpɨ oï mburuvicha guasurä Israel pe jare mbovɨ año ma oiko mburuvicha guasurä yave
1Samuel13:2 oiparavo tres mil kuimbae Israel iñemuña reta
1Samuel13:3 Jare Jonatán oporepeña sundaro filisteo reta jeyupa güɨnoi ɨvɨtɨ re vae re
1Samuel13:4 Jare opaete Israel iñemuña reta oendu jei reta vae: “Saúl oporepeña filisteo reta jeyupa re; jare jókuae re Israel iñemuña reta oñemotareɨuka filisteo reta pe.” Jare opaete Israel iñemuña reta oyemboatɨ Saúl ndive Gilgal pe.
1Samuel13:5 Jayave filisteo reta oyomboatɨ oñeraro vaerä Israel iñemuña reta ndive. Oyomboatɨ treinta mil käretou ñeraro pegua
1Samuel13:6 Jare Israel iñemuña reta oecha opaetei oñeova ñogüɨnoi yave
1Samuel13:7 Jare amogüe hebreo reta oasa ɨ̈aka Jordán
1Samuel13:8 Jare jae oäro chiu ara
1Samuel13:9 Jayave Saúl jei: —Peru cheve amee vaerä Tumpa pe
1Samuel13:10 Jare jae opa ma omee mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae yave
1Samuel13:11 Jayave Samuel jei chupe: —¿Mbae pa ko reyapo? Jare Saúl jei: —Aecha sundaro reta oñemi ma yogüɨraja ye ñogüɨnoi chegüi
1Samuel13:12 jae cheyeupe: “Yogüeruta añave filisteo reta cheve kuae Gilgal pe
1Samuel13:13 Jayave Samuel jei Saúl pe: —¡Mbaetɨ etei jaekavi kuae reyapogüe! Mbaetɨ reñovatu yandeYa Tumpa iporookuai
1Samuel13:14 Ërei añave ndeporookuaía ngaraa oiko avei. YandeYa oeka ma iyeupe metei kuimbae jae ipɨakatu jese vae
1Samuel13:15 Jayave Samuel oyeupi Gilgal güi Gabaa kotɨ Benjamín iɨvɨ pe. Jare Saúl oipapa jae ndive ñogüɨnoi vae reta seisciento kuimbae.
1Samuel13:16 Jayave Saúl jare taɨ Jonatán jare ïru reta jae ndive ñogüɨnoi vae opɨta reta Gabaa pe Benjamín iɨvɨ pe
1Samuel13:17 Jare filisteo reta jeyupa güi ñogüɨnoe mboapɨ yemboyao sundaro reta
1Samuel13:18 Ïru yemboyao yogüɨraja Bet-horón kotɨ
1Samuel13:19 Jare opaete ɨvɨ Israel pe mbaetɨ etei metei ave jiero pegua mbaravɨkɨ oyapo vae
1Samuel13:20 Jáeramo opaete Israel pegua reta yogüɨraja filisteo reta pɨriño oimbeeuka vaerä metei ñavo iarao itï
1Samuel13:21 Filisteo reta jepɨ okovara yɨɨ oimbee vae re
1Samuel13:22 Jare jókuae ara oñeraro reta yave Micmas pe
1Samuel13:23 Jare sundaro filisteo reta metei yemboyao
1Samuel14:1 Jare metei ara Jonatán Saúl taɨ jei jembiokuai tembiporu ñeraro pegua ivoɨa pe: —Eyu
1Samuel14:2 Saúl oï jayave Gabaa jembeɨ pe temitɨ granada jee vae Migrón pe oï vae igüɨ pe
1Samuel14:3 Jare temimonde iyɨvambae sacerdote pegua omonde vae jae ko Ahías
1Samuel14:4 Jókuae tape Jonatán oasata sundaro filisteo reta jeyupa kotɨ vae rupi
1Samuel14:5 Metei ɨ̈vavira oï ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ Micmas kotɨ
1Samuel14:6 Jare Jonatán jei jembiporu ñeraro pegua ivoɨa pe: —Eyu yaja ñapüa kuae itumpa-raanga pota vae reta re. Güɨramoi yandeYa yandemborɨta ko
1Samuel14:7 Jare jembiporu ñeraro pegua ivoɨa jei chupe: —Eyapo ndepɨa pe reyemongeta reyapo vaerä vae
1Samuel14:8 Jayave Jonatán jei jembiporu ñeraro pegua ivoɨa pe: —Yaasa jovaicho pe
1Samuel14:9 Jare jei reta yandeve yave körai: “Oreräro joko peño rojo roväe regua peve”
1Samuel14:10 Ërei jei reta yandeve yave: “Peyeupi peyu orekotɨ”
1Samuel14:11 Jare jökorai mókoi reve oyeechauka filisteo reta pe. Jare jae reta oecha yave jei: “Mase
1Samuel14:12 Jare jókuae sundaro reta osapúkai Jonatán pe jare jembiporu ñeraro pegua ivoɨa pe jei reve: —¡Peyeupi peyu orekotɨ
1Samuel14:13 Jare Jonatán opoñɨ oyeupi
1Samuel14:14 Jae kuae tenondegua ñeraro pe Jonatán jare jembiporu ñeraro pegua ivoɨa
1Samuel14:15 Jare opaete teyupa pegua reta jare ikatu pe teyupa güi ñogüɨnoi vae reta okɨɨye rai yae. Jaeramiño vi sundaro reta teyupa pegua jare ñeraro regua reta okɨɨye yae reta vi
1Samuel14:16 Jare Saúl isundaro omaeäro vae reta oecha Gabaa Benjamín iɨvɨ güi
1Samuel14:17 Jayave Saúl jei isundaro reta jae ndive ñogüɨnoi vae reta pe: —Peyopapa jare pemae kavi
1Samuel14:18 Jare Saúl jei Ahías pe: —Eru Tumpa ikäjou cheve. Echa jayave rupi oimeño Tumpa ikäjou Israel iñemuña reta ndive.
1Samuel14:19 Jare Saúl imiari ramboeve oï sacerdote ndive
1Samuel14:20 Jare Saúl omboatɨ opaete vae jae ndive ñogüɨnoi vae
1Samuel14:21 Jare hebreo reta ɨma ma yogüɨreko filisteo reta ndive vae
1Samuel14:22 Jökoraiño vi opaete Israel iñemuña reta oñemi yogüɨreko ɨvɨtɨ Efraín pe vae
1Samuel14:23 Jökorai jókuae ara yandeYa güɨroasayepe Israel iñemuña reta jovaicho reta güi
1Samuel14:24 Ërei kuimbae reta Israel iñemuña reta jókuae ara ikangɨ jare yɨmbɨaɨ
1Samuel14:25 Jare sundaro reta yogüɨraja oväe metei kaa pe
1Samuel14:26 Jare oike reta jókuae kaa pe yave
1Samuel14:27 Ërei Jonatán mbaetɨ yepe oendu tu jei sundaro reta pe vae
1Samuel14:28 Jayave metei sundaro jei Jonatán pe: —Nderu jei Tumpa rovake sundaro reta pe: “Tomano jókuae kuimbae mbae jou kuae ara vae.” Jáeramo sundaro reta ipɨtu yae ñogüɨnoi reta.
1Samuel14:29 Jayave Jonatán jei: —Cheru oyapo ikavimbae kuae sundaro reta pe
1Samuel14:30 jare sundaro reta ipuere viña jäta ngatu jou yave mbae tovaicho reta güi opɨ̈rogüe. ¡Jare ñamɨriasɨ yaeta tëi ko filisteo reta!
1Samuel14:31 Jókuae ara Israel iñemuña reta jeta oyuka filisteo reta
1Samuel14:32 jayave jovaicho reta güi mbae opɨ̈rogüe re opoko reta jare oipɨɨ reta vecha
1Samuel14:33 Jare omombeu reta Saúl pe: —Sundaro reta iyoa yandeYa kotɨ
1Samuel14:34 Jaeramiño vi pemombeu peïru reta pe
1Samuel14:35 Jare Saúl omopüa metei mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae yandeYa pe
1Samuel14:36 Kuae jaɨkue rupi Saúl jei: —Yagüeyɨ kuae pɨ̈tu ñaporepeña filisteo re
1Samuel14:37 Jayave Saúl oparandu Tumpa pe: —¿Chepuere pa aporepeña filisteo reta re? ¿Remeeta pa Israel iñemuña reta ipo pe? Ërei yandeYa mbaetɨ mbae jei chupe jókuae ara.
1Samuel14:38 Jáeramo Saúl jei: —Toya katu cheré opaete sundaro ruvicha reta
1Samuel14:39 ¡YandeYa Israel iñemuña reta oepɨ vae jee re tae: Yepe tëi cheraɨ ko Jonatán
1Samuel14:40 Jayave Saúl jei opaete Israel iñemuña reta pe: —Peyemboatɨ tee pe reta
1Samuel14:41 Jayave Saúl jei yandeYa Israel iTumpa pe: —Eechauka oreve jupi vae suerte rupi. Jare suerte oa Saúl re jare Jonatán re
1Samuel14:42 Javoi Saúl jei: —Orembosuerte cheraɨ ndive. Jare suerte oa Jonatán re.
1Samuel14:43 Jayave Saúl jei Jonatán pe: —Eyemombeu cheve
1Samuel14:44 Jare Saúl jei: —¡Tumpa täta toiporarauka cheve
1Samuel14:45 Jayave opaete vae jei Saúl pe: —¿Omanota yera Jonatán opa ramo Israel jovaicho reta omoamɨri vae? ¡Agüɨye jökorai! YandeYa jee re
1Samuel14:46 Jare Saúl mbaetɨ ma oaɨkuemoña filisteo reta; jare filisteo reta opa yogüɨraja ye jëta kotɨ.
1Samuel14:47 Jökorai Saúl oiko mburuvicha guasurä Israel pe yave
1Samuel14:48 Omboatɨ isundaro reta
1Samuel14:49 Jae kuae Saúl taɨ reta: Jonatán
1Samuel14:50 Jare Saúl jembireko jee Ahinoam
1Samuel14:51 Echa Cis jae ko Saúl tu
1Samuel14:52 Opaete ara Saúl oiko ramboeve mburuvicharä
1Samuel15:1 Jaɨkue rupi Samuel jei Saúl pe: —YandeYa ko cheokuai roparavo yave mburuvicha guasurä
1Samuel15:2 Körai jei yandeYa imbaepuere yae ete vae: “Che aiporaraukata Amalec iñemuña reta oyapo Israel iñemuña reta pe vae re
1Samuel15:3 Jáeramo
1Samuel15:4 Jayave Saúl omboatɨ opaete isundaro reta Telaim pe
1Samuel15:5 Jare Saúl ojo Amalec iñemuña reta jëta guasu kotɨ
1Samuel15:6 Jare Saúl jei ceneo reta pe: —¡Pesɨrɨ jare peë Amalec iñemuña reta ipɨte güi agüɨye vaerä pomokañɨtei jae reta ndive
1Samuel15:7 Jare Saúl omboɨpɨ oñeraro Amalec iñemuña reta ndive
1Samuel15:8 Jare oipɨɨ jekove reveño Agag
1Samuel15:9 Jare Saúl jare isundaro reta mbaetɨ oyuka Agag
1Samuel15:10 Jare yandeYa jei Samuel pe
1Samuel15:11 —Chembopɨatɨtɨ Saúl añono ramboeve mburuvicha guasurä
1Samuel15:12 Samuel opüa ndei köe mbove ojo vaerä oñoövaiti Saúl ndive; jare omombeu reta Samuel pe
1Samuel15:13 Jare Samuel ou Saúl pɨri
1Samuel15:14 Jayave Samuel jei: —¿Aipoa vecha iñee jare guaka iñee aendu aï vae pa mbae?
1Samuel15:15 Jare Saúl jei: —Amalec iñemuña reta güi ko güeru reta; echa sundaro reta iñɨ̈ro vecha jare guaka ikavigüe pe
1Samuel15:16 Jayave Samuel jei Saúl pe: —¡Nekïrii
1Samuel15:17 Jare Samuel jei: —¿Yepe tëi michi yae viña remae ndeyé reveä pa
1Samuel15:18 Jare yandeYa ndeokuai ndemondo
1Samuel15:19 ¿Maera pa reenduä yandeYa iñee? Nderovaicho reta imbaembae re reyemombae
1Samuel15:20 Jare Saúl jei Samuel pe: —Aendu ko yandeYa iñee
1Samuel15:21 Ërei sundaro reta oipɨɨ vecha reta jare guaka reta ikavigüe
1Samuel15:22 Jayave Samuel jei: “¿Oyerovia yae pa yandeYa mɨmba reta oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae re
1Samuel15:23 Echa mbaekuaa rupi mbae maratuta vae re oikuaa vae iyoa rami ko ipɨapochɨ vae iyoa; tumpa-raanga omboete vae rami ko iñeereendumbae. Nde reröɨro yandeYa iñee jeko pegua
1Samuel15:24 Jayave Saúl jei Samuel pe: —Ayapo mbaeyoa; echa ayavɨ yandeYa iporookuai reta jare neñee reta
1Samuel15:25 jare yaja che ndive amboete vaerä yandeYa.
1Samuel15:26 Jare Samuel jei Saúl pe: —Ngaraa ma aja nde ndive; echa reröɨro yandeYa iñee
1Samuel15:27 Jare Samuel oyerova ma ojo vaerä yave
1Samuel15:28 Jayave Samuel jei chupe: —Körai yandeYa omondoro añave ndeporookuaía Israel iñemuña reta güi
1Samuel15:29 Jare Tumpa Israel iyemboetea ngaraa iyapu jare ngaraa vi oipoepɨ iyemongeta
1Samuel15:30 Jare jei: —Ayapo mbaeyoa. Ërei romoñera chemboete vaerä mburuvicha rami Israel iñemuña reta jóvai jare itenondegua reta jóvai
1Samuel15:31 Jare Samuel ojo Saúl ndive
1Samuel15:32 Jaɨkue rupi Samuel jei: —Peru cheve Agag
1Samuel15:33 Jare Samuel jei: —Ndekɨsepuku pe reeya jeta kuña reta imembɨmbae
1Samuel15:34 Javoi jaɨkue rupi Samuel ojo Ramá pe
1Samuel15:35 Kuae jaɨkue rupi mbaetɨ ye Samuel oecha Saúl opaete oikove oiko ramboeve. Samuel oäpiro Saúl
1Samuel16:1 YandeYa jei Samuel pe: —¿Kërai yave regua pa reäpirota Saúl? Che aröɨrogüe ma ko
1Samuel16:2 Jare Samuel jei: —¿Këraita pa aja? ¡Saúl oikuaa yave
1Samuel16:3 Jare eenɨi Isaí mɨmba oyeyuka oñemeea pe
1Samuel16:4 Jare Samuel oyapo yandeYa jei chupe rami
1Samuel16:5 Jae jei: —Jökorai ko. Ayu ko amee mɨmba oyeyukagüe yandeYa pe; peñeñono tee jare peyu che ndive mɨmba oyeyuka oñemee yandeYa pea pe. Javoi Samuel oñono tee Isaí jare taɨ reta
1Samuel16:6 Jare jae reta yogüeru yave
1Samuel16:7 Ërei yandeYa jei Samuel pe: “Agüɨye emae jova re
1Samuel16:8 Jayave Isaí oenɨi taɨ Abinadab
1Samuel16:9 Jaɨkue rupi Isaí omboasa vi taɨ Sama. Jare Samuel jei: —YandeYa mbaetɨ vi kuae oiparavo.
1Samuel16:10 Jökorai Isaí omboasauka chiu taɨ reta Samuel jóvai; ërei Samuel jei Isaí pe: —YandeYa mbaetɨ oiparavo kuae reta.
1Samuel16:11 Jayave Samuel jei ye Isaí pe: —¿Jae pa opaete kuae nderaɨ reta? Jare jae jei: —Oata vɨteri taɨkuegua ete
1Samuel16:12 Jökorai omondo güeruruka. Jae ko ipireyu
1Samuel16:13 Jare Samuel oipɨɨ vecha kuimbae-räti asaite güɨnoi pɨpe vae
1Samuel16:14 Jare yandeYa iEspíritu osɨrɨ Saúl güi
1Samuel16:15 Jáeramo iyɨvɨrigua reta jei chupe: —Mase
1Samuel16:16 Jayave oreokuai ore nderembiokuai reta roeka vaerä ndeve oikatu ombopu arpa vae
1Samuel16:17 Jare Saúl jei chupe reta: —Peeka cheve arpa oikatu ombopu vae
1Samuel16:18 Jayave metei iyɨvɨrigua jei: —Mase
1Samuel16:19 Jare Saúl omondo ñee jerajaa reta Isaí oïa pe jei reve: “Embou cheve nderaɨ David
1Samuel16:20 Javoi Isaí ombovoɨta imburika mbɨyape pe
1Samuel16:21 Jare David ou Saúl pɨri
1Samuel16:22 Jayave Saúl omondo omoñera Isaí opɨta vaerä David jae ndive
1Samuel16:23 Jare Tumpa omaeño ou espíritu ikavimbae vae Saúl re yave
1Samuel17:1 Mburuvicha filisteo reta omboatɨ isundaro ñeraro peguarä
1Samuel17:2 Saúl jare sundaro Israel iñemuña reta vi oyomboatɨ jare oyembojeyupa reta ɨvɨtɨ päu ipe kavi vae Ela jee vae pe
1Samuel17:3 Jare filisteo reta ñogüɨnoi metei ɨvɨtɨ re
1Samuel17:4 Jayave filisteo reta jeyupa güi oë metei kuimbae jëia yae ñeraro pe vae
1Samuel17:5 Güɨnoi iñäka re metei äka-ɨru jiero iyu vae pegua
1Samuel17:6 Jare itɨmaka re güɨnoi yeopiaka jiero iyu vae pegua
1Samuel17:7 Imii iɨ ipoguasugüe
1Samuel17:8 Oyemboɨ jare ombou iñee sundaro Israel iñemuña reta pe
1Samuel17:9 Jare jókuae kuimbae oñoraro che ndive vae chemoamɨri yave
1Samuel17:10 —Jare jókuae filisteo jei ye—: “¡Che ayapo añave kuae pomboarasɨ vaerä! ¡Pembou cheve metei kuimbae oñoraro vaerä che ndive!”
1Samuel17:11 Saúl jare opaete Israel iñemuña reta oendu jókuae filisteo iñee yave
1Samuel17:12 David jae ko Efrataɨgua Isaí taɨ
1Samuel17:13 Jare mboapɨ taɨ tenondegua reta ñogüɨnoi Saúl ndive ñeraroa pe
1Samuel17:14 Jare David jae ko taɨkuegua ete tɨkeɨ reta güi.
1Samuel17:15 Jare David ojo ñeraroa pe Saúl jeyupa oïa pe
1Samuel17:16 Jare jókuae filisteo ou Israel iñemuña reta kotɨ
1Samuel17:17 Metei ara Isaí jei taɨ David pe: —Eipɨɨ veinte kilo rupi trigo oyeimbegüe jare payandepo mbɨyape
1Samuel17:18 Eraja vi payandepo kesu sundaro ruvicha tenondegua ete pe. Emae nderɨkeɨ reta re
1Samuel17:19 Saúl jare David tɨkeɨ reta
1Samuel17:20 Jayave David opüa ndeimboveasɨ
1Samuel17:21 Israel jare filisteo reta oyeapo kavi ñogüɨnoi oñeraro vaerä
1Samuel17:22 Jayave David oeya ivoɨta mbae re oyangareko vae ipo pe
1Samuel17:23 Jare oñomomiari ñogüɨnoi ramboeve
1Samuel17:24 Jare Israel iñemuña reta oecha yave kuae kuimbae
1Samuel17:25 Jare Israel iñemuña reta metei ñavo jei: “¿Peecha pa jókuae kuimbae oë tenonde vae? ¡Jae oë tenonde omboarasɨ vaerä Israel iñemuña reta! Oime kia omoamɨri yave
1Samuel17:26 Jayave David oparandu jae ndive ñogüɨnoi vae reta pe: —¿Mbae pa oñemeeta jókuae kuimbae omoamɨri kuae filisteo vae pe
1Samuel17:27 Jare jeta vae reta jei ye tenonde yave jei reta ramiño
1Samuel17:28 Kuae re oendu yave tɨkeɨ Eliab iyarasɨ yae David kotɨ
1Samuel17:29 David jei: —¿Ërei mbae pa ayapo? ¡Aparanduí ko aï!
1Samuel17:30 Osɨrɨ tɨkeɨ güi jare ojo ïru reta kotɨ oparandu jókuae re yeño
1Samuel17:31 Jare jókuae iparandu oendu vae reta omombeu Saúl pe
1Samuel17:32 Jare David jei Saúl pe: —Agüɨye metei ave ipɨa toyembopɨtu jókuae kuimbae jeko pegua; che taja tañoraro jókuae filisteo ndive.
1Samuel17:33 Jare Saúl jei David pe: —Nde ngaraa ndepuere reo nde aeño pea filisteo kotɨ reñeraro vaerä jae ndive; echa nde ndetaɨrusuasɨ yae ko
1Samuel17:34 Jare David jei Saúl pe: —Che jae ko cheru ivecha reta re oyangareko vae; jare ou yave yaguapope ani oso
1Samuel17:35 che aaɨkuemoña jare ayuka
1Samuel17:36 Yaguapope ani oso viña pa ayuka; vɨtei pa kuae filisteo itumpa-raanga pota vae
1Samuel17:37 Jare jei ye David: —YandeYa chereepɨ yaguapope ipöape güi jare oso ipöape güi vae
1Samuel17:38 Jare Saúl omondeuka jemimonde ñeraro pegua David pe
1Samuel17:39 Jare David oñono Saúl ikɨsepuku ikúa re
1Samuel17:40 Jare oipɨɨ ipopoka ipo pe
1Samuel17:41 Jare jae oya ou oiko David kotɨ; jare iyeopiaka ivoɨa oiko jenonde.
1Samuel17:42 Jare oecha David yave
1Samuel17:43 Jare jei David pe: —¿Yaɨmba pa che
1Samuel17:44 Javoi jei ye David pe: —¡Eyu chekotɨ! ¡Tamee ndesoo chucha reta pe jare mbaeporou reta ñana rupigua pe!
1Samuel17:45 Jayave David jei chupe: —Nde reyu chekotɨ kɨsepuku ndive
1Samuel17:46 Jae nemeeta añave chepo pe
1Samuel17:47 Jare opaete kuae pe yatɨ ñogüɨnoi vae reta oikuaata
1Samuel17:48 Jare jókuae filisteo oepeña ma David yave
1Samuel17:49 opöe ivokoo pe
1Samuel17:50 Jayave David osɨi jare opɨ̈ro filisteo iárambo; jare ikɨsepuku güɨnoe chugüi jɨru güi
1Samuel17:51 
1Samuel17:52 Jayave Israel kotɨgua jare Judá kotɨgua reta osapúkai jare ñogüɨnoe oaɨkuemoña reta filisteo reta opa yogüɨraja oväe regua ɨvɨtɨ päu ipe kavi vae pe
1Samuel17:53 Israel iñemuña reta opa ye ma oyerova oporoaɨkuemoñaa güi yave
1Samuel17:54 Javoi David güɨraja Goliat iñäkagüe Jerusalén pe
1Samuel17:55 Saúl oecha David oñoepeña jókuae filisteo ndive yave
1Samuel17:56 —Mburuvicha
1Samuel17:57 Jare David ou ye ma filisteo oyukaa kotɨ güi yave
1Samuel17:58 Jare Saúl oparandu chupe: —Kunumi
1Samuel18:1 David opa imiari Saúl ndive yave
1Samuel18:2 Jókuae ara Saúl omombɨta oïa pe
1Samuel18:3 Jonatán jare David oyapo oyoupe morogüɨrökuavee päve oyoaɨu avei vaerä
1Samuel18:4 Jare oekɨ iñeapevaka jemimonde iarambogua jare omee David pe
1Samuel18:5 Jare David ojo oipota rupi Saúl omondoa kotɨ
1Samuel18:6 Jökorai jae reta oyerova ye yave
1Samuel18:7 Jare otairari kuña reta opɨrae vae reta
1Samuel18:8 Jáeramo Saúl täta iyarasɨ
1Samuel18:9 Jare jókuae ara güive Saúl mbaetɨ ma omae kavi David re.
1Samuel18:10 Jare pɨareve pe Tumpa omaeño espíritu ikavimbae vae oya Saúl re
1Samuel18:11 Jayave jae oyapi pɨpe
1Samuel18:12 Saúl okɨɨye David güi
1Samuel18:13 Jayave Saúl ombosɨrɨ iyeugüi jare oñono mil vae sundaro reta juvicharä; jare David güɨraja jare güeru ye yepi ñeraroa güi.
1Samuel18:14 Jare David oyapo opaete mbae yarakuaa katu reve kavi
1Samuel18:15 Jare Saúl oecha yave David oyapo opaete mbae yarakuaa katu reve kavi
1Samuel18:16 Ërei opaete Israel kotɨgua jare Judá kotɨgua oaɨu David
1Samuel18:17 Metei ara Saúl jei David pe: —Mase
1Samuel18:18 Ërei David jei Saúl pe: —Mbaeä etei ko che jare cherëtara reta
1Samuel18:19 Jare ou ara oväe Saúl omee vaerä tayɨ tenondegua Merab jee vae David jembirekorä yave
1Samuel18:20 Ërei Saúl tayɨ Mical jee vae iporopota oiko David re
1Samuel18:21 Jare Saúl oyemongeta jei: “Tamee cherayɨ chupe
1Samuel18:22 Jayave Saúl oyókuai jembiokuai reta jei: —Pemiari vɨari David pe jare pere chupe
1Samuel18:23 Jayave jókuae tembiokuai reta imiari jókuae ñee David pe
1Samuel18:24 Jare yogüeru ye jókuae tembiokuai reta imiari mburuvicha guasu pe David jeigüe.
1Samuel18:25 Jayave Saúl jei: —Pere David pe
1Samuel18:26 Jayave Saúl jembiokuai reta omombeu David pe yave
1Samuel18:27 David opüa ojo isundaro reta ndive
1Samuel18:28 Ërei Saúl oecha yave yandeYa oï David ndive
1Samuel18:29 jeiete okɨɨye chugüi
1Samuel18:30 Mburuvicha filisteo reta ñogüɨnoe oñeraro ñavo
1Samuel19:1 Saúl omomiari taɨ Jonatán jare opaete jembiokuai reta oyuka reta vaerä David. Ërei Jonatán oaɨu yae David ramo
1Samuel19:2 omondo omombeu David pe jei reve: —Cheru Saúl oipota ndeyuka
1Samuel19:3 Che ajata cheru ndive jókuae reñemi reïa rupi. Chemiarita nderé cheru pe
1Samuel19:4 Jare Jonatán omomiari kavi tu Saúl
1Samuel19:5 Jae oñemoëgua ko mano pe oyuka yave filisteo Goliat
1Samuel19:6 Jare Saúl oendu Jonatán jeigüe yave jei Tumpa jee re: —YandeYa oikove vae jee re
1Samuel19:7 Jayave Jonatán oenɨi David
1Samuel19:8 Kuae jaɨkue rupi oiko ye ñeraro
1Samuel19:9 Jare Tumpa omaeño ou espíritu ikavimbae vae Saúl re oguapɨ oï yave jo pe
1Samuel19:10 Saúl oipota tëi oikutu David mii pe ovapetea re
1Samuel19:11 Saúl omondo ñee jerajaa reta David jëta pe
1Samuel19:12 Jayave Mical ombosagüɨu omoë David ventana rupi o güi
1Samuel19:13 Javoi Mical oipɨɨ mbae iägüe omboyapakua tupa pe
1Samuel19:14 Jare Saúl ombou yave ñee jerajaa oipɨɨ vaerä David
1Samuel19:15 Ërei Saúl omondo ye ñee jerajaa reta omae vaerä David re
1Samuel19:16 Jayave oike reta yave David jo pe
1Samuel19:17 Jókuae re Saúl jei Mical pe: —¿Maera pa körai chembotavɨ
1Samuel19:18 David otekuarai jare ojoyepe
1Samuel19:19 Jare Saúl oikuaa David oime oï Naiot pe Ramá pe yave
1Samuel19:20 Saúl omondo iñee jerajaa reta güeru vaerä David
1Samuel19:21 Saúl oikuaa yave kuae re
1Samuel19:22 Jayave jae etei ojo Ramá pe
1Samuel19:23 Jare ojo jokotɨ. Jare ogüeyɨ vi jese Tumpa iespíritu
1Samuel19:24 Jare omboi jemimonde jare omboɨpɨ omombeu Tumpa iñee
1Samuel20:1 David otekuarai Naiot güi Ramá güi
1Samuel20:2 Jare jae jei chupe: —¡Agüɨye eyemongeta jökorai! ¡Ngaraa ndeyuka! Mase
1Samuel20:3 Jare David jei ye Tumpa jee re: —Nderu oikuaa kavi yae che jae ko ndevɨa-ïru
1Samuel20:4 Jare Jonatán jei David pe: —¿Kërai pa reipota romborɨ?
1Samuel20:5 Jare David jei Jonatán pe: —Mase
1Samuel20:6 Jare nderu chereeka yave
1Samuel20:7 Jare jae jei yave ikaviño ko
1Samuel20:8 Eyapo ikavi vae cheve
1Samuel20:9 Jare Jonatán jei chupe: —¡Agüɨye eyemongeta jökorai! Aikuaa yave cheru oipota ndeyuka amombeuta ko ndeve.
1Samuel20:10 Jare David jei Jonatán pe: —¿Kia pa omombeuta cheve nderu oyemongeta kaviä cheré vae?
1Samuel20:11 Jare Jonatán jei David pe: —Eyu che ndive yaja ko pe. Jare yogüɨraja päve ko kotɨ.
1Samuel20:12 Jare joko pe Jonatán jei David pe: —YandeYa Israel iTumpa jovake
1Samuel20:13 Ërei cheru ndemomburu ndeyuka vaerä yave
1Samuel20:14 Ërei aikoveño jókuae ara rupi yave cheparareko yandeYa jee re
1Samuel20:15 eiparareko avei cheñemuña reta. ¡YandeYa omboai yave metei ñavo nderovaicho
1Samuel20:16 Jökorai Jonatán oyapo morogüɨrökuavee päve David ndive
1Samuel20:17 Jare Jonatán oyapouka ye David pe morogüɨrökuavee päve
1Samuel20:18 Javoi Jonatán jei: —Pɨareve ko yasɨ pɨau iyarete
1Samuel20:19 Mboapɨ ara mbaetɨta reï
1Samuel20:20 Jare che amondota mboapɨ uvɨ jókuae iyɨpɨ kotɨ
1Samuel20:21 Javoi amondota cherembiokuai jare jaeta chupe: “Ekua eeka uvɨ reta.” Jare jae yave chupe: “Kɨ̈vatɨ oime oï uvɨ
1Samuel20:22 Ërei che jae yave jókuae cherembiokuai pe: “Mase
1Samuel20:23 Ërei jókuae ñee morogüɨrökuavee päve yayapo vae
1Samuel20:24 Jayave David ojo oñemi kaa pe; jare yasɨ pɨau iarete oväe yave
1Samuel20:25 Oguapɨsea peño oguapɨ ovapetea kotɨ. Jonatán oguapɨ jóvai. Jare Abner oguapɨ Saúl iyɨpɨ pe
1Samuel20:26 Jókuae ara Saúl mbaetɨ etei mbae jei
1Samuel20:27 Ërei pɨareve pe mokoía ara ma arete yave
1Samuel20:28 Jare Jonatán jei: —David ojo ko Belén pe.
1Samuel20:29 Chemoñera amaeño vaerä ojo
1Samuel20:30 Jayave Saúl iyarasɨ Jonatán kotɨ jare jei chupe: —¡Kuña jeko kavimbae vae imembɨ! ¿Mbaetɨecha pa aikuaa ndeve reiparavo ndevɨa-ïrurä Isaí taɨ vae
1Samuel20:31 Echa opaete ara Isaí taɨ oikove oiko ramboeve kuae ɨvɨ pe
1Samuel20:32 Ërei Jonatán jei tu pe: —¿Maera pa omanota? ¿Oime pa mbae ikavimbae oyapo?
1Samuel20:33 Jayave Saúl oipɨɨ imii oyuka vaerä taɨ Jonatán
1Samuel20:34 Jayave Jonatán iyarasɨ yae reve opüa mesa güi
1Samuel20:35 Pɨareve pe ndeimbove Jonatán ojo kaa pe
1Samuel20:36 Jare jei jembiokuai pe: —Esɨi ekua eru uvɨ reta omondota vae. Jare kunumi osɨi ojo yave
1Samuel20:37 Jare kunumi ojo oväe Jonatán uvɨ omondoa pe. Jonatán osapúkai kunumi pe jei reve: —¡Uvɨ oime oï kutɨ ye ndegüi!
1Samuel20:38 Jare osapúkai ye Jonatán kunumi pe: —¡Esɨi
1Samuel20:39 Ërei mbaetɨ etei mbae re oikuaa
1Samuel20:40 Kuae jaɨkue rupi
1Samuel20:41 Jare jembiokuai ojo ma yave
1Samuel20:42 Jare Jonatán jei David pe: —Ekua ndepɨakatu reve
1Samuel21:1 David ojo tëta Nob pe
1Samuel21:2 Jare David jei sacerdote Ahimelec pe: —Mburuvicha guasu cheokuai metei mbae re
1Samuel21:3 Añave
1Samuel21:4 Jare sacerdote jei David pe: —Mbaetɨ anoi mbɨyape oipotagüeño chepo pe
1Samuel21:5 Jare David jei sacerdote pe: —Añetete
1Samuel21:6 Jökorai sacerdote omee chupe mbɨyape oñeñono tee vae
1Samuel21:7 Jókuae ara oï joko pe
1Samuel21:8 Jare David jei Ahimelec pe: —¿Mbaetɨ pa renoi mii ani kɨsepuku kuae pe? Echa mburuvicha guasu iporookuai jarembae pegua yae jeko pegua
1Samuel21:9 Jare Sacerdote jei chupe: —Oime anoi Goliat filisteo ikɨsepukugüe
1Samuel21:10 Jare David opüa jókuae ara
1Samuel21:11 Jare iyɨvɨrigua reta jei chupe: —¿Jaeä yera kuae David
1Samuel21:12 Jare David oikuaa opaete kuae imiari reta ñogüɨnoi vae re
1Samuel21:13 Jáeramo oipoepɨ jeko jae reta jóvai
1Samuel21:14 Jayave Aquis jei iyɨvɨrigua reta pe: —Pe reta peecha ko kuae kuimbae imbokere
1Samuel21:15 ¿Oata pa imbokere vae cheve
1Samuel22:1 Jayave David ojo joko güi
1Samuel22:2 Jare oyemboatɨ jae ndive opaete oiporara yae vae
1Samuel22:3 Joko güi David ojo Mizpa
1Samuel22:4 Jare güeru reta mburuvicha guasu Moab pegua jóvai
1Samuel22:5 Ërei ñeemombeúa Gad jei David pe: —Agüɨye epɨta kuae ñepɨ̈roka pe
1Samuel22:6 Saúl oguapɨ oï ɨvɨra tamarisco jee vae iküaraɨa igüɨ pe
1Samuel22:7 jei jembiokuai iyɨ́vɨri ñogüɨnoi vae reta pe: —Peyeapɨsaka Benjamín iñemuña reta. ¿Perovia pa Isaí taɨ omeeta peve ɨvɨ jare uvarupa?
1Samuel22:8 Opaete pe reta peyovaicho cheré
1Samuel22:9 Jayave Doeg Edom pegua oï Saúl jembiokuai reta itenondegua ipɨte pe jei: —Che aecha Isaí taɨ ou Nob pe
1Samuel22:10 Jare jae oparandu yandeYa pe jesegua
1Samuel22:11 Jare mburuvicha guasu Saúl omondo oenɨiuka sacerdote Ahimelec
1Samuel22:12 Jayave Saúl jei Ahimelec pe: —Ahitob taɨ
1Samuel22:13 Jare Saúl jei chupe: —¿Maera pa nde jare Isaí taɨ peyovaicho cheré? Nde remee chupe mbɨyape jare kɨsepuku
1Samuel22:14 Jayave Ahimelec jei mburuvicha guasu pe: —¿Kia nunga pa ndeɨvɨrigua reta güi jupi yae David rami
1Samuel22:15 ¿Ani jaeramo yera aparandu yandeYa pe jese? ¡Mbaetɨ ko jökorai! Agüɨye chemboeko jare agüɨye vi emboeko cherëtara reta
1Samuel22:16 Ërei mburuvicha guasu jei: —¡Eikuaa kavi kuae re
1Samuel22:17 Jayave mburuvicha guasu jei jembiokuai reta pe: —¡Peyuka yandeYa isacerdote reta! Echa jae reta vi oñemoïru David ndive
1Samuel22:18 Jayave mburuvicha guasu jei Doeg Edom pegua pe: —¡Nde eyuka kuae sacerdote reta! Jayave jae jókuae ara oyuka ochenta y cinco sacerdote.
1Samuel22:19 Jare sacerdote reta jëta Nob jee vae pe oike reta
1Samuel22:20 Ërei metei Ahimelec taɨ
1Samuel22:21 Jare Abiatar imiari David pe; kërai Saúl opa oyukauka yandeYa isacerdote reta Nob pegua vae.
1Samuel22:22 Jare David jei Abiatar pe: —Echa jókuae ara oï joko pe Doeg Edom pegua yave
1Samuel22:23 Ërei nde epɨta che ndive
1Samuel23:1 Jayave oikuaauka reta David pe jei reve: “Filisteo reta opüa Keila re
1Samuel23:2 Jare David oparandu yandeYa pe jei reve: —¿Ajata pa añeraro filisteo reta ndive? Jare yandeYa jei chupe: —Ekua eñeraro jare eepɨ tëta guasu Keila.
1Samuel23:3 Ërei jae ndive ñogüɨnoi vae reta jei David pe: —Mase
1Samuel23:4 Jayave David oparandu ye yandeYa pe
1Samuel23:5 Jayave ojo David jare kuimbae reta jae ndive ñogüɨnoi vae ndive Keila kotɨ
1Samuel23:6 Abiatar
1Samuel23:7 Jare Saúl pe oikuaauka reta David oime tëta Keila pe vae yave
1Samuel23:8 Javoi Saúl omboatɨ opaete isundaro reta yogüɨraja vaerä Keila kotɨ oipɨɨ David
1Samuel23:9 Ërei David oikuaa yave Saúl oyemongeta kaviä ikotɨ
1Samuel23:10 Jare David jei: —CheYa Israel iTumpa
1Samuel23:11 ¿Keila pegua reta chemeeta pa jae ipo pe? ¿Outa pa Saúl aikuaa aï rami? ¡Romoñera cheYa Israel iTumpa
1Samuel23:12 Javoi David oparandu chupe: —¿Chemeeta pa Keila pegua reta Saúl ipo pe? ¿Che jare cherupiegua reta? Jare yandeYa jei: —Pemeeta jae ipo pe.
1Samuel23:13 Jayave David jare jupiegua seisciento kuimbae ndive
1Samuel23:14 Jare David opɨta ñuu Zif jee vae pe
1Samuel23:15 David okɨɨye oiko Saúl güi
1Samuel23:16 Jare Jonatán Saúl taɨ opüa ou Hores pe David oïa pe
1Samuel23:17 jei chupe: —Agüɨye ekɨɨye
1Samuel23:18 Jare oyapo reta morogüɨrökuavee päve yandeYa jee re
1Samuel23:19 Jare Zif pegua reta yogüɨraja Gabaa pe imiari vaerä Saúl pe
1Samuel23:20 Jáeramo
1Samuel23:21 Jare Saúl jei: —YandeYa tiporerekua peré
1Samuel23:22 Añave pekua jare peikuaa kavi kia pe oñemi oï vae
1Samuel23:23 Pemae kavi jese kerupi rupi oñemi vae re
1Samuel23:24 Jare jae reta opa ye yogüɨraja Zif kotɨ Saúl oïa güi. Ërei David jare jupiegua kuimbae reta
1Samuel23:25 Jare Saúl ojo kuimbae jupiegua reta ndive
1Samuel23:26 Jare ɨvɨtɨ iyɨ́vɨri rupi Saúl ojo isundaro reta ndive
1Samuel23:27 Jayave ou metei ñee jerajaa omombeu Saúl pe
1Samuel23:28 Jayave Saúl mbaetɨ ma oaɨkuemoña David
1Samuel23:29 Joko güi David ojo oiko ñepɨ̈roka oï En-gadi pe vae rupi.
1Samuel24:1 Saúl oyerova ye ma filisteo reta ndive oñeraroa güi yave
1Samuel24:2 Jayave Saúl omboatɨ tres mil kuimbae Israel iñemuña reta güi oyeparavogüe
1Samuel24:3 Jare jókuae tape rupi ojo oväe metei vecha reta jókai pe yave
1Samuel24:4 Jayave David jupiegua kuimbae reta jei chupe: —Jae kuae ara yandeYa jei ndeve vae oyembopo: “Ameeta ndepo pe nderovaicho.” Eyapo chupe añave jaekavi ndeve vae. Jare David opüa jare kïrii ngatu reve ayasɨa Saúl jemimonde jembeɨ.
1Samuel24:5 Kuae jaɨkue rupi David oyembopɨaä
1Samuel24:6 Jare jei jupiegua reta pe: —¡YandeYa tacheövatu agüɨye vaerä ayapo mbae ikavimbae vae cheya pe! Jae ko mburuvicha guasu
1Samuel24:7 Jökorai David oyopia jupiegua kuimbae reta
1Samuel24:8 Kuae jaɨkue rupi David opüa vi jare oë ɨvɨkuarusu güi jare osapúkai omondo iñee Saúl pe
1Samuel24:9 Jare David jei Saúl pe: —¿Maera pa rerovia kia reta iñee jei ndeve yave: “David ndemomburu oiko”?
1Samuel24:10 Añave ndepuere reecha kërai yandeYa nemee tëi chepo pe
1Samuel24:11 Emae
1Samuel24:12 ¡YandeYa tiñanejäa
1Samuel24:13 Ndechi reta iñee arakuaa pegua jei rami: ‘Jeko kavimbae reta güi oë mbae ikavimbae.’ Jayave che ngaraai amopüa chepo nderé.
1Samuel24:14 ¿Kia jaɨkue pa Israel iñemuña reta juvicha guasu ojo? ¿Kia pa oaɨkuemoña? ¡Che ko metei yaɨmba omanogüe vae rami
1Samuel24:15 YandeYa toiko ñanejäa vaerä ¡Jae toï omae vaerä añave kërai aï vae re
1Samuel24:16 Jare David opa yave kuae ñee jei
1Samuel24:17 Jare jei David pe: —Jupi yae nde chegüi
1Samuel24:18 Añave nde remboyekuaa cheve ndepɨakavi chekotɨ vae
1Samuel24:19 Echa
1Samuel24:20 Añave aikuaa kavi yae
1Samuel24:21 Añave yandeYa jee re erökuavee cheve
1Samuel24:22 Jayave David oñererökuavee yandeYa jee re Saúl pe
1Samuel25:1 Samuel omano

1Samuel25:3 Kuae kuimbae jee Nabal
1Samuel25:4 Jare David ñuu pe oikuaa Nabal oñapi güɨnoi ivecha reta vae.

1Samuel25:6 Oyókuai jei vaerä körai: “Mbɨakatu toï nde ndive
1Samuel25:7 Aikuaa reñapi renoi ndevecha reta. Mase

1Samuel25:9 Jare yogüɨraja oväe yave kuae kunumi reta

1Samuel25:11 ¿Aekɨta yera cherembiokuai reta jembíu
1Samuel25:12 Jayave David jembiokuai reta opa ye yogüeru
1Samuel25:13 Jayave David jei jupiegua reta pe: —¡Peyeapo katu perembiporu ñeraro pegua ndive! Jare metei ñavo oyeapo kavi ikɨsepuku ndive
1Samuel25:14 Ërei metei Nabal jembiokuai ojo jei Abigail
1Samuel25:15 Jókuae kuimbae reta ipɨakavi yae ko ore ndive roiko yave jae reta ndive ñuu pe
1Samuel25:16 Jae reta oyangareko kavi oreré jare orerɨmba reta re
1Samuel25:17 Añave eyemongeta kavi
1Samuel25:18 Jayave Abigail oipɨɨ dosciento mbɨyape
1Samuel25:19 Jare jei jembiokuai reta pe: —Pekua tenonde
1Samuel25:20 Jare opo metei mburika re jare oñemi reve ogüeyɨ ɨvɨtɨ güi. Jare oecha
1Samuel25:21 David yepe jei ipɨa pe ou oiko: “Ayangarekoiño ma Nabal jɨmba reta re ñuu pe
1Samuel25:22 ¡Tumpa täta toiporarauka cheve pɨareve oime yave aeya kia nunga kuimbae jekove reve Nabal jëtara güi!”
1Samuel25:23 Jare Abigail oecha yave David ogüeyɨ voi imburika güi
1Samuel25:24 Javoi oya katu David ipɨ re
1Samuel25:25 Agüɨye eyapo Nabal jei vae; jae jee rami etei ko jeko. Echa jae ko jee Nabal
1Samuel25:26 Añave cheya
1Samuel25:27 Jare añave kuae mbota reta aru ndeve vae
1Samuel25:28 Che romoñera neɨ̈ro vaerä cheve kuae re. Echa yandeYa oyangarekota nderé jare neñemuña reta re
1Samuel25:29 Yepe tëi amogüe reta oyovaicho nderé jare oipota ndeyuka
1Samuel25:30 Jare yandeYa ombopo ma yave opaete iporogüɨrökuavee nderé
1Samuel25:31 ngaraa reyembopɨaä ani ndepɨatɨtɨ reyuka jekombae vae re
1Samuel25:32 Jare David jei Abigail pe: —Toyemboete yandeYa Israel iTumpa
1Samuel25:33 Jare eyekou ndeyemongeta jupi vae re
1Samuel25:34 Ërei yandeYa Israel iTumpa jee re
1Samuel25:35 Jare David oipɨɨ chugüi opaete mbae güeru chupe vae
1Samuel25:36 Jare Abigail ou ime Nabal pɨri. Oecha jae oyapo arete mburuvicha guasu arete oyapo rami. Oyerovia katu oï jare osavaɨpo yae vi
1Samuel25:37 Ërei pɨareve ndeimbove pe
1Samuel25:38 Jare payandepo araa pe

1Samuel25:40 Jare David jembiokuai reta yogüeru Carmel pe Abigail pɨri
